title: iOS Developer
description:
#### **Why choose Coody**


At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:

**Maximized Compensation.** Typically a +40% salary increase.

**Freedom & Flexibility**. No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.

**Employment Security.** High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.

**Shape the Future.** Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.

 *As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*

#### **What you’ll be doing**


As a **Senior iOS Engineer** at Coody, you’ll own features end-to-end, from discovery and architecture through implementation, release, and telemetry. Assignments are typically 6-24 months, and as a consultant you’re expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one. While your core focus is iOS, you’ll occasionally work across the stack: shaping APIs with backend teams, integrating SDKs, and improving CI/CD and automation processes. You’ll drive code quality, performance profiling, accessibility, and security best practices, and you’ll play a key role in teams of varying sizes to deliver reliable, user-loving products.

#### **Who you are**


We are seeking a **Senior iOS Engineer with at least 5+ years of experience**. You must have a proven ability to get things done. Here’s what we’re seeking:

* 5+ years building production iOS apps, including handling complex edge cases.
* Solid skills in the Swift ecosystem (e.g. SwiftUI, UIKit, Core Data).
* Experience, or a drive, to build machine-learning features in apps (Core ML/ML Kit).
* A degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related field.
* **Based in Sweden**: You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency.
* Fluent in English (spoken and written).

#### **This is Coody**


We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting,combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.


At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition, which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.


Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.


We’re a **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals**, representing more than **14 nationalities**.

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy**. Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice, **explore our Employee Handbook** and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.

#### **How to apply**


Are you excited to take your career to the next level and meet the criterias? Apply now, and we'll be in touch shortly.

title: Golang Developer
description:
#### **Why choose Coody**


At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:

* **Based in Sweden**: You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency.

#### **This is Coody**

title: .Net Developer
description:
#### **Why choose Coody**


At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:

**Maximized Compensation.** Typically a +40% salary increase.

**Freedom & Flexibility**. No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.

**Employment Security.** High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.

**Shape the Future.** Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.

 *As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*

#### **What you’ll be doing**


As a **Senior .Net Developer** at Coody, you’ll help build and scale new and existing products with real end-to-end ownership of the service, the code, and the outcomes. Assignments are typically 6-24 months, and as a consultant you’re expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one. While your home base is backend C#, you’ll sometimes work across the full tech stack (e.g., frontend, integrations, cloud infrastructure, CI/CD, data flows) to ship complete solutions. You’ll design and build scalable, robust applications in cloud environments, contribute to architecture and testing/automation, and play an active role in a teams of different sizes.

We are seeking a **.Net Engineer with at least 5+ years of experience**. You must have a proven ability to get things done. Here’s what we’re seeking:

title: Junior systemutvecklare .NET och Webb
description:
### **Eida söker en junior systemutvecklare - Är det du?**

*Vi söker dig* som är nyutexaminerad eller med några års erfarenhet, och vill vara med på vår spännande resa.


Har du en utbildning eller relevant erfarenhet inom .NET och Javascript med fokus på React, samt är nyfiken på en dynamisk arbetsplats som präglas av passion, kvalité och kundfokus? Trivs du i en roll där du får vara inblandad i stora delar av den tekniska stacken samt de organisatoriska processerna? Då kan Eida vara rätt plats för dig.

### **Om tjänsten**


Som junior systemutvecklare hos oss kommer du arbeta och lära dig mer om allt från utveckling, test, dev-ops, projektering och idé-arbete. Du förväntas att vara intresserad av att jobba med och vara intresserad av att vidareutvecklas inom dessa områden. Vi söker dig som inte drar sig för en utmaning, och som är trygg i din förmåga att ta in och förstå ny teknik och nya tekniska koncept. Tidigare arbetslivserfarenhet inom .NET och Javascript är meriterande, men låt det inte avskräcka dig som är nyutbildad inom området.

* .NET
* Typescript / React
* Microsoft Azure
* Kubernetes
* Terraform

title: Senior ServiceNow Developer
description:
**Senior ServiceNow Developer**

  


**Work on complex infrastructure data at global scale**

  



ServiceNow is at the heart of how ASSA ABLOY delivers and manages IT services globally. In this role, you will ensure the platform is trusted and effective — with high-quality CMDB data, reliable Discovery processes, and a scalable architecture supporting a complex international environment.



Your work will define how infrastructure, services, and dependencies are modelled, governed, and consumed through the ServiceNow CMDB across a global organisation.

**The role**

  



You will be driving key areas of the ServiceNow platform, with a strong focus on CMDB and Discovery. Working closely with ServiceNow Solution architects and infrastructure and service management teams, you will translate technical and business needs into reliable, well-governed platform solutions that scale across a global environment.



You will act as a senior technical reference point, helping to strengthen standards, improve consistency, and drive long-term platform quality and stability.



**What you will work on**

  


* Design and develop ServiceNow solutions aligned with infrastructure and service needs
* Own and improve CMDB structure, data quality, and lifecycle management (CSDM alignment)
* Configure and optimise ServiceNow Discovery and related integrations
* Develop scoped applications, scripts, and integrations using platform best practices
* Ensure platform security, stability, and compliance with internal standards
* Collaborate with IT teams to model services and dependencies accurately


**What will help you succeed**

  


* Strong hands-on experience as a ServiceNow Developer in enterprise environments
* Deep knowledge of CMDB, CSDM, and service modelling
* Proven experience with ServiceNow Discovery and infrastructure data sources
* Good understanding of IT infrastructure (cloud, on-prem, networks, servers)
* ServiceNow System Administrator certification (additional certifications is a plus)
* ITIL knowledge and experience in global organisations


**Why ASSA ABLOY**

  



You will join a global organisation where ServiceNow is a core platform for IT operations, directly influencing how services are delivered and understood worldwide.



This is an environment where technical ownership matters and where improvements to data quality and platform structure have real operational impact.

  


* **Meaningful mission:** Improve the accuracy and reliability of global IT service data
* **Innovation and scale:** Work in a complex international ServiceNow environment with deep CMDB and Discovery integration
* **Autonomy and trust:** Take ownership of technical decisions and influence platform standards
* **Growth and development:** Strengthen your position as a senior ServiceNow specialist
* **Work–life balance:** Hybrid working with a pragmatic, Scandinavian approach to work


**Ready to take ownership of ServiceNow at scale?**

  



If you enjoy solving complex CMDB and Discovery challenges and want to shape a platform used across a global organisation, we would like to hear from you.

  


**Apply today — we review applications continuously.**

  



We’re committed to building diverse, inclusive teams and encourage applications from all who see themselves thriving here. To make sure your personal data stays protected, we do not review applications sent via email or post. If you have questions about the role or process, contact Léa Rein, Senior Talent Acquisition Business Partner at lea.rein@assaabloy.com.


**Let’s create a safer and more open world — together.**

  


**We are the ASSA ABLOY Group**  

Our people have made us the global leader in access solutions. In return, we open doors for them wherever they go. With nearly 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries, we help billions of people experience a more open world. Our innovations make all sorts of spaces – physical and virtual – safer, more secure, and easier to access.

As an employer, we value results – not titles, or backgrounds. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally.

As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.
company_description: Let’s create a safer and more open world – together!

title: Embeddedutvecklare inom Applikation
description:
**Bli en del av vårt team och utveckla nästa generations embeddedlösningar!**


QRTECH befinner sig i en stark tillväxtresa och söker nu seniora embeddedutvecklare med fokus på applikationsnära firmware. Hos oss får du arbeta med avancerad teknik i utvecklingsprojekt som spänner från idé och koncept till färdig produkt och leverans. Vi är ett teknikdrivet bolag i Mölndal/Göteborg som utvecklar elektronik och mjukvara åt kunder inom flera högteknologiska branscher – från innovativa startups till globala industriföretag.

**Om rollen**


Vi söker dig som vill ta ett helhetsansvar i utvecklingen av robusta embeddedlösningar. Du omsätter krav till fungerande funktioner, driver implementation från idé till leverans och identifierar risker på applikationsnivå. Rollen innebär arbete nära både hårdvara och mjukvara, där integration mot drivers, middleware och BSP är en naturlig del av vardagen.


Du kommer att arbeta med kommunikation mot andra system och molnlösningar, med stort fokus på funktion, robusthet och långsiktig underhållbarhet. Vi tror att du både ser tekniken och användarbehoven, och att du värdesätter läsbar, strukturerad och välarkitekturerad kod.


Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i varierande och tekniskt utmanande projekt tillsammans med engagerade och kunniga kollegor i en organisation som präglas av samarbete, innovation och ständig utveckling.

**Vi söker dig med erfarenhet av:**

* 5–10+ års erfarenhet av embeddedutveckling med fokus på applikationsnära firmware
* C och C++ för embeddedapplikationer
* Integration mot drivers, middleware och BSP
* Zephyr, FreeRTOS eller Embedded Linux
* Kommunikation mellan system och molntjänster
* MATLAB/Simulink
* Git
* B.Sc. eller motsvarande examen inom datateknik, elektronik eller embedded systems
* Svenska och engelska i tal och skrift

**Personliga egenskaper**


För att trivas hos oss tror vi att du är strukturerad, lösningsorienterad och har ett starkt tekniskt driv. Du gillar att ta ansvar och driva arbetet framåt samtidigt som du är en lagspelare som uppskattar samarbete och kunskapsdelning. Du är kvalitetsmedveten och har förmågan att balansera tekniska detaljer med helhetsperspektiv och användarnytta.

**Varför QRTECH?**


Hos oss blir du en del av en lärande organisation där erfarenhet, nyfikenhet och innovation står i centrum. Vi erbjuder en stimulerande arbetsmiljö med varierande projekt, kompetenta kollegor och stora möjligheter till personlig och teknisk utveckling. Vi har kollektivavtal, konkurrenskraftiga förmåner och en kultur som präglas av öppenhet, engagemang och balans.


Läs mer på QRTECHs hemsida. Ansök redan idag – urval sker löpande.


Vi hanterar själva rekryteringen och undanber oss kontakt från externa rekryterings- och annonsleverantörer.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
Development at Nolimit City (part of Evolution AB) is a challenging and exciting role where you will be part of a team dedicated to creating solutions that redefine our industry. By working in small, highly collaborative teams, you and your team will have clear ownership of one of our most important new initiatives.
   

  

 At Nolimit City, we optimize for quality, fast flows, and iterative development with short feedback loops. We have a strong focus on end-to-end ownership, continuous improvement, monitoring, and experimentation. We strive to have teams that are inclusive, helpful, and have a strong sense of ownership for what they build. Our engineers make some of the most significant decisions for the company, and we are looking for open and curious developers. As part of the Nolimit City team, you will be part of one of Sweden's fastest-growing companies and contribute to creating value for our players worldwide.
   

  

 We are expanding several of our engineering teams, including the team working on new initiatives with innovative products for our end users and work on our core products.
   

  

 Although we prefer that you're working on-site we also undertand that you have a life outside of work, meaning that working remote from time to time, leaving early, coming in late etc is not something unusual for us. A bit of a cliche; but we do in fact offer a great deal of freedom but with that comes responsibility.
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

* Own the product from start to finish. Decide how it is best built, tested, deployed, and monitored.
* Work with large-scale, highly available, and robust modern systems.
* Be an integral part of a team and its culture and ways of working.
* Work with automated deployment enabling release multiple times a day.
* Succeed, fail, and learn together with other competent and talented people. We believe in an environment that offers growth opportunities and see education as a result of failure that brings us closer to the next breakthrough.
* Take responsibility for system design, work together with domain architects, own end-to-end problems, manage stakeholder communication, and mentor junior engineers.


 Who you are
   

  

* Tech stack should include: JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React, Java.
* Experience with advanced JavaScript libraries and frameworks
* Experience with APIs and product development
* A passion for writing clear and sustainable code
* Experience with agile methodologies, continuous integration, continuous delivery
* Good spoken and written English skills
* You thrive in an environment where you are responsible for your code and takes ownership of the change from editor to production system
* We understand that you might not have experience in all the areas listed above, but as long as you have the ambition and willingness to learn we would like to hear from you.


 Some of our technologies
   

  

* Javascript / TypeScript
* React / NextJS
* Redux / Redux-Toolkit Query
* Strapi (Headless CMS)
* Node.js and Express.js
* Java 17, Dropwizard
* MySQL
* PostgreSQL
* AWS, Ubuntu, Docker, GitHub Actions


 Who we are
   

  

 We are the best and fastest growing slot provider in the world with the operator and product in focus, and the mobile future on our minds. Nolimit is a team of experienced professionals from the gambling industry in Stockholm, Sweden, Malta and Gurugram, India. Our company has derived from hands on work at some of the most successful gambling software providers and operators over the last 15 years. Our mission is to offer a fast, reliable and flexible team that cooperates with the best operators in the world, taking gambling to the next level.
   

  

 We have a clean code high performance modern mini/micro service portable system platform for mobile and desktop that is 100 % under our own control. Since we have our own platform, this allows us to deliver special features and smooth, customizable marketing campaigns that are tailored to the operator's specific needs. We think it's time for a new angle to the gambling software industry – one where the product is in focus and we fully engage their promotion, marketing and country manager system/activities with our games. Nolimit work with customers on a global scale and the largest gambling operators in the world have our games everywhere.
   

  

 Nolimit City, Stockholm based development team. We provide you with your choice of OS and IDE.
   

  

 Send your application to hr-sweden@nolimitcity.com
   

  

 http://www.nolimitcity.com

title: Math Curriculum Developer
description:
**About Magma**
 Magma is a startup that has quickly grown to become the leading platform for data-driven math education. By leveraging handwritten solutions in a digital format, Magma allows teachers to place emphasis on creativity in math, while gaining key insights into student progression. This creates a more engaging, inclusive and pedagogical math class for all students.
   

  

 Math remains the largest challenge for schools, where one in five students in year 9 are low performers. Math is one of the core pillars on which careers are built, and we believe that school math represents one of the largest opportunities at improving educational outcomes and career prospects for children and young adults.
   

  

 Magma is now growing rapidly across Europe and the US. We are an ambitious team on a meaningful mission of improving math education for millions of children.
   

  

 ‍
   

  

**The Role**
 You will primarily work with the international part of the content team, i.e., those responsible for all the math problems that teachers share with their students in equivalent elementary and high schools in the USA and the UK. The primary focus of this work is to create and organize math problems to support schools and school districts in the US and UK, as well as utilize lots of AI technology to make your work efficient. In addition, you may grow into a project management role, taking ownership of individual projects and leading them to completion. You will also get the chance to work closely with users through classroom visits to observe how the content functions in practice, and you will identify opportunities for improvement from both the student and teacher perspectives.
   

  

 At Magma, we work very closely together in the different teams. This offers the opportunity to gain insight into, for example, how sales processes, product development, customer success, and content, operate together within a company like ours. For those who are interested and eager to try new things, there are endless opportunities to expand responsibilities and grow within the company.
   

  

 ‍
   

  

**Who You Are And What You Know**
 We are looking for you who have graduated from Swedish high school before August 2026, and are:
   

  

* Very social and enjoys collaborating with others
* Fluent in English, both spoken and written, as a large part of the work is conducted in English
* Eager to learn new things, and eventually take the step towards becoming a project manager
* Goal-oriented and accustomed to working towards deadlines
* Flexible and open to rapid changes in a dynamic work environment
* Great at communicating
* Interested in growing together with us


**To Succeed In The Role You Need To**
* Be hardworking and willing to join a fast-paced and rapidly growing startup
* Strike the right balance between being efficient and producing high-quality content‍
* Take initiative to grow in your role as well as give feedback to others


**Requirements**
* Swedish high school diploma
* At least math content knowledge up to Matematik 3b
* Excited about working with a team, in office, and not remotely‍


**What We Offer**
* Play a key role in an exciting journey. We are a young company with ambitious targets and meaningful goals

**Start:** 
 Beginning/middle of August 2026
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Stora Nygatan 27
   

  

**Note:** 
 We are hiring at least 2 people for this position

title: Back End Developer
description:
Stockholm l On Site 2 Days Per Month l Python/GCP/Agentic AI
 



  





 A well-established Nordic technology company operating one of the region’s largest digital commerce platforms is looking to hire Backend Engineers as part of a major platform and AI transformation initiative.
 



  





 The business operates a large-scale marketplace ecosystem connecting millions of products, merchants, and consumers across the Nordics. With significant transaction volumes and complex platform infrastructure, engineering sits at the core of the company’s future growth strategy.
 



  





 Over the last few years, they’ve invested heavily into modernising their platform architecture and are now building highly scalable, AI-enabled systems designed to support the next generation of e-commerce experiences.
 



  





 The Engineering Environment
 



  





 This is not a traditional “feature factory” engineering team.
 



  





 The company is heavily focused on:
 



  





 \* Distributed systems
 



 \* Event-driven architecture
 



 \* High-scale backend engineering
 



 \* System orchestration
 



 \* Cloud-native infrastructure
 



 \* AI-assisted and agentic engineering workflows
 



  





 They’re particularly interested in engineers who understand how large systems behave at scale and who can work effectively in environments where AI increasingly becomes part of the software development lifecycle.
 



  





 The emphasis is far more on engineering capability, architecture understanding, and systems thinking than specific frameworks or languages.
 



  





 What You’ll Be Doing
 



  





 \* Building scalable backend services
 



 \* Designing and improving distributed systems
 



 \* Working on event-driven platform architecture
 



 \* Solving performance and scalability challenges
 



 \* Collaborating across platform and product engineering teams
 



 \* Contributing to AI-enabled engineering initiatives and workflows
 



  





 Tech Environment
 



  





 Current technologies include:
 



  





 \* Python
 



 \* FastAPI
 



 \* Kafka
 



 \* Kubernetes
 



 \* PostgreSQL
 



 \* Redis
 



 \* Cloud infrastructure
 



  





 However, strong backend engineers from any modern stack are encouraged to apply.
 



  





 What They’re Looking For
 



  





 \* Strong software engineering fundamentals
 



 \* Experience with scalable backend systems
 



 \* Understanding of distributed architectures
 



 \* Experience working in cloud-native environments
 



 \* Engineers comfortable with ownership and technical decision-making
 



 \* Strong problem-solving and systems-thinking ability
 



  





 Experience within:
 



  





 \* Marketplace platforms
 



 \* E-commerce
 



 \* Fintech
 



 \* High-traffic consumer systems
 



 \* Event-driven platforms
 



  





 …would all be highly relevant.
 



  





 Why This Opportunity?
 



  





 \* Large-scale technical challenges
 



 \* AI-first engineering direction
 



 \* Modern architecture environment
 



 \* Strong technical culture
 



 \* High ownership and autonomy
 



 \* Hybrid setup with only 2 onsite days per month
 



  





 📩 For more information:
 



 b.emery@tenthrevolution.com

title: Software Developer
description:
*Vi tror att framsteg och möjligheter skapas bäst tillsammans. Välkommen till en plats där samarbete gör skillnad.*
**Din roll**
 Vi söker mjukvaruutvecklare till en växande avdelning som utvecklar ett av världens främsta Command & Control-system. Systemet används för att planera, bearbeta sensordata från exempelvis radar och skapa beslutsunderlag som underlättar våra kunders arbete.
   

  

 Du arbetar projektorienterat i ett utvecklingsteam där du är med och designar, implementerar och testar mjukvara för produkter som visualiserar information från flera olika informationskällor och sensorer, med fokus på kartmotorer.
   

  

 Rollen är placerad i Järfälla och resor kan förekomma beroende på projekt och kundbehov. Det finns även goda möjligheter att anpassa tjänsten utifrån din profil och kompetens.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kan bland annat innebära:
   

  

* Design och utveckling av mjukvara för avancerade systemlösningar
* Implementation och test av funktionalitet kopplad till visualisering och kartmotorer
* Integration av data från olika sensorer och informationskällor
* Samarbete med kollegor och kunder i agila utvecklingsteam
* Medverkan genom hela utvecklingsprocessen från krav till test


**Din profil**
 Vi söker dig som nyligen avslutat dina studier eller har något års erfarenhet. Du har en teknisk högskoleutbildning och ett stort intresse för programmering och systemutveckling. Du tycker om att arbeta i team, hitta effektiva lösningar och lära dig nya saker.
   

  

 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet inom något eller flera av följande områden:
   

  

* Kartmotorer såsom Carmenta
* Qt Quick, MFC, Java, C++, C eller Ada
* Datorarkitektur och operativsystem
* IT-säkerhet
* Agila arbetssätt
* Test och verifiering


*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*
**Vad du blir en del av**
 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26,100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här
   

  

 Om du är intresserad av vilka förmåner som du kan ta del av som anställd på Saab i Sverige, kan du läsa om dem här

title: Developer - JS Fullstack
description:
We at Elite Prospects are looking for an experienced JS Fullstack Developer to join our Product and Tech team.
 



  





 You’ll be a key addition to our special teams, driving the play, setting up scoring chances, and helping the entire lineup perform at its peak.
 



 We aim to become a world-class engineering team that combines speed with excellence, that other divisions can rely on completely, and that pushes the boundaries of what’s possible in our product. It is a tight roster where collaboration, creativity, and strong passing plays are part of our daily game.
 



 We are primarily based in Malmö and Stockholm and we are looking for someone to work on-site with us.
 



  





**What You Will Work On** 




  





 Right now we are reshaping our web and app experience with the ambition to become the "LinkedIn of Hockey." This means strengthening network effects and delivering a personalized, persona-driven experience that adapts onboarding, features, and workflows to the unique needs of players, professionals, organizations and fans.
 



  





 You will help us create experiences that keep the hockey world informed, inspired, and always one stride ahead.
 



  





**Your Player Type** 




  




* Pragmatic and proactive
* React/React native, Nextjs, Graphql
* Strong TypeScript skills
* Ability to write clean, testable, well-structured code
* Understanding of performance implications and async behavior
* Deep understanding of CSS architecture
* Can work independently and break down complex tasks
* Can mentor others and give/receive feedback



  





**Who You Are** 




  




* At least 5 years of qualified work experience after completing your post secondary education
* Fluent in English. Swedish fluency is a bonus
* A hockey or sports interest is very welcome
* A genuine passion for software development and modern technology
* Someone who keeps up with the latest trends and learns new things easily



 As a person, we believe you:
 


* Enjoy working with agile development methods
* Take initiative and help drive the process forward when we are under pressure in the box
* Are a true team player who prioritizes collective success over individual stats



  





**Practical Information** 




  





 This is a full time role based in our Stockholm office at Gamla Brogatan 11.
 



 We want you to be on site at least four days per week. Trust us, once you get to know the team you will want to be there. Working together face to face makes everything more fun and helps us level up faster.
 



  





**What We Offer** 




  





 The chance to work on a very exciting, fast growing product that we fully believe in
 



 A skilled and friendly team that values collaboration, shared success, and having fun together
 



 A welcoming and inclusive culture
 



  





**Some examples of what we do as a team:** 




  





 An annual conference where we gather every colleague from across more than three continents
 



 A strong focus on competence development including monthly learning sessions
 



 Frequent after work activities and fun games at the office
 



  





 If you want to join a team that builds the future of hockey technology and enjoy doing it, then Elite Prospects is ready to take the ice with you.

title: System Developer - Cybersecurity
description:
We are looking for a System Developer who can blend software development expertise with a strong interest in security. In this role, you’ll contribute directly to RaySearch’s mission: advancing cancer treatment through innovative software. By ensuring that our products are designed and implemented securely, you help protect both patients and healthcare professionals and strengthen the reliability of the tools they depend on.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a System Developer within cybersecurity, you will play a key role in shaping our secure development practices. You will work closely with development teams to embed security into the software development lifecycle and ensure that our products follow industry-leading standards. The role combines hands-on application security work—such as secure code reviews, threat modeling, and penetration testing—with knowledge sharing, training, and collaborative support to help teams make informed security decisions.
   

  

 This is an ideal role for a developer who enjoys cybersecurity and wants to contribute by guiding others, elevating security awareness, and helping teams work securely and effectively together.
   

  

**Your main tasks**
* Work with development teams to implement application security best practices throughout the SDLC.
* Participate in threat modeling (e.g., STRIDE) and risk assessments for new and existing applications.
* Assist in designing and implementing cybersecurity controls in products.
* Ensure compliance with cybersecurity frameworks and standards.
* Contribute to developer security awareness training and promote secure development practices.
* Perform secure code reviews, static/dynamic analysis, and penetration testing.
* Develop and maintain secure coding guidelines and security documentation.
* Support the preparation of cybersecurity documentation for regulated products (including FDA-related frameworks).


**Your profile**
 You are a developer with a strong interest in cybersecurity and secure design. You enjoy sharing knowledge, collaborating with others, and supporting development teams in building secure solutions. You communicate clearly, work constructively across functions, and contribute to a culture where security is a natural part of everyday development.
   

  

**Required Skills**
* Proficiency in C#, .Net Core, and related technologies.
* Strong understanding of application security principles (e.g., OWASP Top 10, secure coding).
* Experience with threat modeling and risk analysis.
* Excellent ability to produce clear, structured security and compliance documentation.


**It’s an advantage, but not required, if you also have experience of:**
* Working in regulated environments (e.g., medical devices, embedded systems).
* Hands-on experience with security testing tools (e.g., SonarQube, Burp Suite).
* Familiarity with FDA cybersecurity guidelines, the IEC 8100x series, or IEC 62443 for industrial/embedded systems.
* Integrating security into CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions).


**Our Culture**
 Culture at RaySeach is the driving force behind our organization, where everything we do is driven by a shared passion for innovation and the fight against cancer. Our dedication is reflected in our ability to deliver exceptional results, pay close attention to detail, and consistently go the extra mile. Our employees stand out as experts in their field, driven by a relentless focus on solving problems - no matter how complex. At RaySearch, we take pride in leading the way in cancer treatment, leveraging cutting-edge technology to develop innovative solutions that make a real difference in patient care.
   

  

**Our Offer**
 At RaySearch, we offer a diverse and inclusive work environment, fostering openness, sincerity, and collaboration. Located in Hagastaden, Stockholm's Life Science Hub, our modern and creative workspace includes an in-house gym, yoga, and social activities like ping pong, table football, and regular after-work events. Our bistro serves a fantastic lunch buffet, and we offer morning- and afternoon-fika every day. Our rooftop terrace also provides a stunning 360-degree view of Stockholm, enhancing the work experience. All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package.
   

  

**Application**
 Please apply to the position through the application form below. Selection and interviews will be ongoing. We do not accept applications by e-mail.
