**Challenges you will work on**
-------------------------------

  

* Own and drive product performance: Accountable for conversion, revenue, and customer experience within your journey stage, proactively identifying and driving opportunities to improve performance and unlock growth
* Define product strategy and priorities: Translate business goals, customer insights, benchmarking, and data analysis into a clear product vision and roadmap, incorporating innovation and emerging technologies (including AI) where they drive measurable value.
* Drive discovery and experimentation: Lead structured discovery and hypothesis-driven development, using data, customer insights, and benchmarking to validate opportunities and solutions through experimentation, including testing new concepts and AI-enabled capabilities
* Translate strategy into execution: Work closely with Product Owners and delivery teams to ensure priorities are clearly defined, well-prepared, and executed with high quality and speed
* Manage trade-offs and stakeholder alignment: Operate in a complex environment, making transparent prioritization decisions and aligning stakeholders around value-driven outcomes
* Measure impact and close the loop: Define success metrics, track performance, and ensure delivered initiatives translate into measurable business value.
**The Team**
------------

  




You will work as part of a cross-functional product environment together with Product Owners, designers, engineers, architects, and business stakeholders. The setup is highly collaborative and distributed across Commercial and Digital & IT, requiring strong communication, trust, and shared ownership of outcomes. You will report to Head of Digital Sales.

  



The team culture emphasizes customer-centricity, learning, empowerment, and continuous improvement. Product Managers are expected to act as internal voices of the customer while enabling teams to deliver value effectively and sustainably.

**To be successful, we believe you have**
-----------------------------------------

  

* 5+ years of experience as a Product Manager, with end-to-end ownership across the product lifecycle from discovery and definition to delivery and value realization
* Experience working with checkout and payment flows, including understanding of payment methods, transaction funnels, and factors impacting conversion and payment success rates
* Srong commercial and product acumen, with proven ability to translate business strategy, customer insights, and data into clear product vision, priorities, and roadmaps
* Experience driving product performance, with a solid understanding of key digital KPIs (e.g. conversion, revenue, funnel performance) and how to improve them
* Hands-on experience with product discovery and experimentation, including defining problem statements, hypotheses, success metrics, and validating solutions through data and testing
* Strong prioritization and decision-making skills, balancing customer value, business impact, and technical considerations in complex stakeholder environments
* Experience working in agile product development setups, collaborating effectively with Product Owners, engineering teams, UX/design, and architecture
* Strong analytical and data-driven mindset, with hands-on experience using GA4 (or similar) to analyze funnels, identify opportunities, and drive product decisions
* Ability to operate in a matrix organization, partnering across Commercial and Digital & IT, and navigating dependencies related to architecture, security, and compliance
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to align diverse audiences around product direction and priorities
* Customer-centric and curious mindset, with a focus on challenging assumptions, innovation, and continuous improvement
* Fluency in English; Scandinavian language is a plus
* Experience in digital travel or product-led digital businesses is a strong advantage
**Why SAS?**
------------

  




At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:

  




* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.
* Work Environment: Our office location in Frösundavik offers a vibrant workspace with a restaurant, café, and easy access to outdoor activities in Hagaparken and Brunnsviken. Engage in running, tennis, outdoor gym sessions, kayaking, and stand-up paddling with equipment available free of charge.
* Convenient Commute: Benefit from a non-stop bus service connecting our office to Solna station, and commuter trains, alongside a network of cycle paths.
**Our Culture at SAS**
----------------------

  

At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. Join us at SAS and be part of shaping the future of aviation!

**Additional information**
--------------------------

  

* **Deadline for application**: 26/05/2026. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
* **Desired start date:** As soon as possible.
* **Position**: Fulltime (100%) starting with a 6-month probation period.
* **This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm)**, and you will be expected to work onsite. Remote work may also be an option, depending on the agreement made with your manager.

  



Come and fly with us!



#LI-VK1


SAS, Scandinavia's leading airline since 1946, operates from its principal hub at Copenhagen Airport (CPH), complemented by hubs in Oslo (OSL) and Stockholm (ARN). Our mission is to connect Scandinavia with the world and the world with Scandinavia. Each year, SAS serves more than 25 million passengers and transports 55 tons of cargo to 135 destinations across Europe, the USA, and Asia. With a passionate workforce of over 10,000 colleagues, we collaborate with partners and customers to drive transformative changes in aviation. We are committed to achieving net-zero emissions by 2050, embodying the visionary spirit of our founders: “To move from the old to what is about to come, is the only tradition worth keeping”. Innovation and societal progress are at the heart of everything we do. For

title: Praktikplats VÅR 2027
description:
**Observera: Ansökan för hösten 2026 är nu stängd.**

**Vad krävs för att få en praktikplats på KAN?**  

Är du nyfiken, driven och prestigelös? Läser du sista året inom kommunikation, utveckling, performance, media eller film? Eller skolar du kanske om dig till digital projektledare, analytiker eller UX-designer? Din utbildning spelar så klart stor roll, men huvudsaken är att du har ett brinnande intresse för digital kommunikation och är en person som gillar att jobba ihop med ett gäng vänner.

**Hur många platser finns?**  

Vi tar oss an mellan 2-4 praktikanter inom olika områden varje termin. Våra handledare är specialister inom sitt område på byrån. Här finns strateger, konceptutvecklare, filmskapare, designers, copywriters och experter inom sociala medier, teknik och analys. Alla jobbar i olika team, dessa team kan du se här.  

  

**Vad får man göra som praktikant?**

* Arbeta med väletablerade och starka varumärken.
* Få en inblick i arbetet på en av Sveriges största digitala byråer.
* Testa på att arbeta i riktiga projekt.
* Ta initiativ och ansvar, träffa kunder och arbeta i olika team och projekt.
* Vara med på KAN-aktiviteter som frukostar, Fredags-after work, kompetensdelning, träningsaktiviteter och föreläsningar.

**Hur får jag ut det mesta av min praktikperiod?**

* Ställ frågor! Var nyfiken och visa att du vill utvecklas och lära dig saker. Det här är din tid, ta för dig och du kommer växa hos oss.
* Så klart kan det kännas nervöst att komma in på en stor arbetsplats efter en längre studietid. Men vi vet att du är här för att lära dig, våga be om hjälp och prata med de andra i teamet för att lära dig det som du behöver utveckla.
* Ta alla tillfällen som ges att nätverka och skaffa nya kontakter för framtiden. Connecta med medarbetare på LinkedIn och lägg upp att du gör din praktikplats på KAN. Vi har anställt många praktikanter genom åren. Här kan du t ex läsa en intervju med Helena och Philip som praktiserade i UX-teamet under en termin och som sedan började jobba på KAN.

**Vilka kriterier finns?**

* Välj **ett eller max två team** som du vill praktisera hos. Vi kan avläsa om dina färdigheter kan komma till pass någon annanstans på byrån.
* Din praktik behöver löpa över minst åtta veckor, helst längre.
* Praktiken genomförs som **en del av en pågående eftergymnasial utbildning**.
* Målsättningar och förväntningar utformar vi tillsammans innan start.

**Så här väljer vi ut praktikanter till KAN:**

* Vi prioriterar dem som läser sista året på sin utbildning.
* Vi ser helst att man hunnit skaffa sig relevant arbetserfarenhet innan eller under sin studietid.
* En viktig aspekt från vår sida är att **det team** man söker till har möjlighet till handledning under hela praktikperioden.
* I slutfasen blir du kallad till en träff - digitalt eller på vårt kontor. Det är viktigt att vi får reda på dina förväntningar. Därefter väljer vi ut vilka vi kan erbjuda en plats till kommande termin.

#### **Sista ansökningsdag: 1 november 2026**

**När får jag svar?**  

Beslut om att ta emot praktikanter görs tillsammans med våra teamleads. Vi behöver kunna se hur många projekt vi har igång, hur arbetsfördelningen ser ut och hur många som har möjlighet till handledning kommande termin. Vi ger besked om praktikplats inför vårterminen **i mitten av november.**

title: Quality Assurance Analyst
description:
SAVR is a fast-growing Swedish fintech company on a mission to reinvent investing. We empower investors with a platform that offers **lower fees**, **greater transparency**, and a **radically improved experience**.


We’re not just building another investment service — we’re reimagining how financial products should work for people, not just institutions. As part of our ambitious, innovative and curious team, you’ll help shape the future of investing in Sweden and beyond.

**The Role**
------------


We’re looking for a Quality Assurance Analyst who’s excited about building high-quality product experiences across web and mobile. In this role, you’ll help ensure that everything we ship — from onboarding flows to core investment journeys — works smoothly, feels intuitive, and meets a high quality bar.


You’ll work hands-on with continuous testing across multiple devices and product areas, identifying everything from UX improvements and edge cases to larger functional issues before they reach customers. You’ll also play a key role in pre-production regression testing ahead of releases together with external partners, helping us continuously improve how we test, report, and follow up on quality issues.

**Your Mission**
----------------

* Own and execute continuous testing across key product flows on web and mobile (iOS & Android)
* Lead pre-production regression testing ahead of releases together with external partners
* Identify, document, and follow up on bugs, edge cases, and UX improvements
* Design and maintain test plans, regression suites, and QA documentation
* Continuously improve our QA processes, testing coverage, and release confidence

**You’ll Thrive in This Role If You...**
----------------------------------------

* Have 1–3 years of experience in QA, manual testing, or a similar role
* Enjoy exploratory and regression testing and can design test scenarios independently
* Have a sharp eye for detail and a strong sense of product and user experience
* Are comfortable collaborating cross-functionally with product, engineering, and third-party vendors
* Have experience with APIs and integration testing tools such as Postman
* Have basic scripting or automation experience (a plus, not a must)
* Are curious about investments, fintech, or financial markets
* You are fluent (spoken and written) in Swedish and English

**Our Cultural DNA**
--------------------


At SAVR, we’re:


**Open-minded** – we embrace new ideas, diverse perspectives, and continuous learning


**Bold** – we take smart risks, move fast, and aren’t afraid to fail forward


**Honest** – we value transparency, feedback, and doing the right thing

  

We’re a startup, so things can be a little messy — and that’s part of the thrill. If you thrive in building as a team and handling uncertainty, you will fit right in.

**What’s In It for You**
------------------------


You’ll join a product- and design-driven company where your work has real impact. We keep things lean, move fast, and genuinely care about the experience we deliver — for customers and for each other.


Here’s what we offer:


Top-tier work gear


Competitive salary


‍️ Generous wellness allowance


Insurance package


Occupational pension and long-term savings support


*Office-first approach* to foster collaboration and quick decision-making — with flexibility when you need it (4+1)


*Stocked pantry*, plus regular social gatherings and wellness activities to keep energy and culture high

**Our Commitment to Diversity**
-------------------------------


SAVR is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome people from all backgrounds, identities, and experiences. We believe diverse teams build better products and are committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive.

### **Ready to Join Us?**


We’d love to hear from you. Apply now or reach out with any questions — and let’s build something meaningful together.

title: Sr. UX Designer (Consultant)
description:
**About TrusTrace**


Founded in 2016, TrusTrace offers a market-leading platform for supply chain traceability and compliance, enabling brands and suppliers around the world to standardise how supply chain and material traceability data is captured, digitised and shared. TrusTrace is leading global-scale traceability programs for many of the world's largest brands. The company is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, with additional offices in India and employees in the US.

**About the role**


As a Senior UX Designer, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the user experience across our digital products. You'll be responsible for designing intuitive, engaging, and user-centered interfaces that align with both customer needs and business objectives. We're also looking for someone who treats AI as a design collaborator - not just a productivity tool - and can help shape how our team works with AI at a systemic level.

**What you will do**

* **UX Design Leadership:** Lead end-to-end UX design for complex projects, delivering high-quality, user-centered solutions aligned with product and business goals. Track and measure design impact through KPIs to inform continuous improvement.
* **User Research and Insights:** Collaborate with UX researchers and conduct foundational research (e.g., interviews, surveys, usability testing) to keep user needs at the center of the design process.
* **Design Artifacts:** Create concepts, prototypes, and other design artifacts to communicate ideas clearly, iterating based on user and stakeholder feedback.
* **Visual Design:** Develop visually compelling, brand-aligned user interfaces that support clarity, consistency, and accessibility.
* **Cross-Functional Collaboration:** Work closely with product managers, developers, and other stakeholders to ensure designs are implemented accurately and with high quality.
* **Stakeholder Communication:** Present design decisions and rationale clearly, demonstrating how solutions meet both user needs and business objectives.
* **Design Systems and Standards:** Contribute to the design system by maintaining consistency across products and proposing new patterns and standards based on evolving user needs.
* **AI-Native Product Design:** Shape how users experience AI in our products — copilot flows, multi-agent UX, confidence scores, progressive disclosure on AI suggestions — not just use AI in your own process.
* **Mentorship:** Support the growth of junior designers by providing feedback, sharing knowledge, and fostering a team culture. Help establish team-wide AI workflows and frameworks others can adopt.
* **Continuous Improvement:** Stay up to date with UX and design trends, tools, and best practices — bringing new ideas into the team and refining internal processes.

 **Who you might be**

* 6+ years of UX design experience (or equivalent demonstrated experience), with a portfolio showcasing strong, user-centered projects across web (ideally B2B SaaS) products.
* Bachelor's degree in UX Design, HCI, Graphic Design, or a related field; advanced degree is a plus.
* Comfortable using AI for design exploration, copywriting, and spec generation — as default workflow, not novelty.
* Can write a clear, scoped prompt that gets useful output without heavy iteration.
* Understands when AI output needs designer judgment applied on top.
* Familiar with at least one AI-native product pattern (copilot, suggestions, confidence UI, etc.).
* Strong visual design and interaction design skills, with attention to detail and accessibility (WCAG standard).
* Experience with user research and the ability to translate insights into actionable design improvements.
* Demonstrated ability to design AI-native experiences and produce AI-ready specs.
* Experience contributing to and maintaining design systems.
* Strong collaboration and communication skills for working in cross-functional teams.
* Organized and self-directed, able to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
* Passion for great UX and a continuous improvement mindset.

 **What We Offer**

* The opportunity to lead impactful design work in a purpose-driven global scale-up accelerating sustainable transformation in fashion.
* A collaborative, innovative, and inclusive team culture where your ideas are valued.
* The space to explore and shape new tools and methods - including AI - that evolve our craft and improve team workflows.
* A hybrid work model with flexible working arrangements.
* A full-time consultant agreement for 6 month with potential to extension.

title: UX/UI Designer with Frontend Development Skills
description:
At Evolution AB / Nolimit City, we create world-class gaming products with bold, uncompromising design and unmatched attention to detail. We're looking for a UX/UI Designer who doesn't just stop at the design phase — you also bring your ideas to life in code.
 



  





 You'll join a cross-functional product team with full ownership over the solutions you design, working on innovative and highly interactive user experiences seen by players around the world. You’ll collaborate closely with engineers to bring your ideas to life—creating products that are both beautiful and usable. Depending on your experience, you might implement parts of the frontend yourself or work alongside developers to ensure your vision is realized in the final product.
 



  





**What You'll Do** 



* Lead UX and UI design efforts for new and existing products — from user flows and wireframes to high-fidelity mockups.
* Translate your designs into functional, responsive, and accessible frontend components using React (Next.js) and TypeScript.
* Partner with developers and stakeholders to iterate on solutions, run experiments, and refine interfaces based on user feedback and performance data.
* Build and maintain components in a shared design system, ensuring consistency and scalability across products.
* Advocate for user-centered design throughout the product development process.



  





**You Might Be a Great Fit If You** 



* Have a strong background in UX/UI design, with a portfolio showcasing thoughtful, elegant interfaces and interaction design.
* Are fluent in modern design tools like Figma, and enjoy prototyping and testing user flows.
* Know how to write clean, maintainable frontend code using React and TypeScript.
* Are comfortable working with developers and understand how design decisions impact performance and implementation.
* Care deeply about usability, accessibility, and the overall user experience.
* Enjoy working in a fast-paced, collaborative environment where experimentation is encouraged.



  





**Bonus Points** 



* Experience with Next.js, Redux Toolkit, or Headless CMSs like Strapi.
* Familiarity with A/B testing, analytics, and data-driven design decisions.
* An understanding of game or entertainment product design patterns.



  





**Technologies You'll Touch** 



* Figma (or other tools you prefer) / Design Systems
* React / Next.js
* TypeScript / JavaScript
* Redux Toolkit
* CSS / Tailwind CSS
* Strapi (Headless CMS)
* Git (GitHub Actions)



  





**Who we are** 




 You don't need to know everything from day one. If you're a designer who loves to get your hands dirty in code, and you're passionate about crafting exceptional user experiences, we'd love to meet you.
 



  





 Join one of Sweden's fastest-growing companies and help shape the future of interactive entertainment.
 



  





 Nolimit City, Stockholm based development team. We provide you with your choice of OS and IDE.
 



 Apply on LinkedIn, or send your application to hr-sweden@nolimitcity.com
 



 http://www.nolimitcity.com

title: UI/UX Designer
description:
**About Elite Prospects** 




  





 Elite Prospects is the world’s leading hockey platform and the central hub connecting fans, players, agents, scouts, and executives. As the true gateway to hockey, we create opportunities for players while serving as the global community destination for everything related to the game.
 



 With more than thirty thousand paying subscribers, over five hundred thousand registered members, and six million unique monthly visitors, Elite Prospects continues to cement its role as the digital heartbeat of hockey. We are now looking for a UI UX Designer who wants to help shape the future of hockey technology.
 



  





  





**The Role** 




  





 As a UI UX Designer at Elite Prospects, you will own the design value chain for your team. You will lead everything from user research and understanding briefs to concept development, sketching, and handover to developers.
 



 This role requires more than designing within existing constraints. You will need to immerse yourself in the full customer journey, identify opportunities, and propose new ways of packaging or rethinking solutions to achieve the best possible user experience. Your ability to understand users, data, and the complexity of the product will be central to your daily work.
 



 You will work independently as the sole designer in a cross functional team together with product manager and developers. At the same time, you will have access to senior designers who can provide feedback and act as a sounding board for ideas.
 



  





  





**Who You Are** 




  





 Requirements
 



  




* University degree in engineering or a similar relevant field
* Minimum five years of experience working in UI UX across the full process from ideation to implementation and iteration
* Experience working with complex digital products - both web & app - catering to several different user groups
* Experience in data visualization is a strong plus
* Fluency in both Swedish and English
* Strong interest in and knowledge of hockey
* Confident in your professional role and comfortable working independently in cross functional teams



  





 Personal qualities
 



  




* Engaged and passionate about design and product development
* Action oriented with the ability to turn abstract ideas into concrete concepts and designs that create value
* Curious about new tools and ways of working, and comfortable experimenting with AI to improve your design workflow



  





**Team and Workplace** 




 You will join our Product and Tech team based at our main office in central Stockholm. We also have a tech office in Malmö as well as team members working remotely across Europe, North America, and Thailand.
 



  





  





**What We Offer** 




  




* The opportunity to work on a very exciting, fast growing product that we are fully committed to
* A talented, friendly team that values collaboration and truly enjoys working together
* A culture that includes
* An annual company conference bringing together colleagues from across three continents
* Monthly learning sessions focused on personal and professional development
* Frequent after work activities and fun office games



  





 If you want to help build the future of hockey technology and work with a team that plays to win together, Elite Prospects is ready to welcome you onto the ice.

title: UX Designer — Self-Service
description:
**About Curoflow** 




 Curoflow is building the operating system for European private healthcare. Our platform gives SME clinics everything they need to run their practice — from digital patient intake and video consultations to EHR, e-prescriptions, lab integrations, and AI-powered clinical support — in a single, CE-marked, GDPR-compliant solution.
 



  





 We are 25 people today, operating customers across 9 geographic markets and we are getting ready to scale to ~70 employees across 5 core markets — and beyond — within ~18 months.
 



  





**We Are Hiring Across the Organisation** 




 This job ad is one of many we are releasing simultaneously. We are building multiple teams in parallel — product, engineering, commercial, operations, and leadership — as we enter the most defining chapter in our company’s history.
 



  





 While we are publishing these roles now (May 2026), we expect most hires for this wave to begin working between September and November 2026. We will take the time we need to find the right person for each role. We would rather wait for the right fit than rush to fill a seat.
 



  





**What Kind of Person We Are Looking For** 




 Let’s keep it simple. Curoflow is a start-up that will be having growth pains — with everything that entails. You will be judged first and foremost by your character. If you are applying for this job thinking it is just any other job, you would be wrong.
 



  





 We will demand a growth mindset and someone who is deeply committed to our goals. You will be compensated accordingly, but we must stress that we are looking for the type of person whose motivation primarily comes from earning stock options and being part of building a great company.
 



 In return you will get that rare, once-in-a-lifetime opportunity that can mark a lifelong memory of what you were part of building.
 



  





**The Role: UX Designer — Self-Service** 




 The first 15 minutes of a clinic’s experience with Curoflow will determine whether they stay or leave. As UX Designer for Self-Service, you are the person who designs those 15 minutes.
 



 You will be responsible for the entire self-service onboarding experience — from the moment a clinic owner lands on our signup page to the moment they see their first patient. This includes the configuration wizard, the go-live checklist, the integration setup, and every micro-interaction in between.
 



 You will work within a dedicated self-service squad alongside a Product Manager, two engineers, and a QA engineer. Together, you will build the product that transforms Curoflow from a sales-assisted platform into a true product-led growth engine.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 




***First 6–12 Months***




 • Lead user research from day one — interview clinic owners, shadow onboarding sessions, and map every friction point in the current assisted onboarding process
 



 • Design the end-to-end self-service onboarding flow: signup, clinic configuration, scheduling setup, branding, integration selection, and go-live
 



 • Create prototypes and run usability tests with real clinic owners across multiple European markets
 



 • Build and maintain a self-service component library that extends Curoflow’s existing design system
 



 • Design the integration marketplace UX — how clinics discover, activate, and configure third-party integrations (labs, prescriptions, billing)
 



 • Work closely with engineers to ensure designs are implementable within technical constraints (multi-tenancy, provisioning speed, market-specific variations)
 



  





***As We Scale (12–24 Months)***




 • Design the white-label configuration experience for partner and reseller channels
 



 • Create the analytics dashboard that gives self-service clinics visibility into their practice performance
 



 • Evolve the experience based on data — reduce drop-off, increase zero-touch completion, and improve time-to-first-patient
 



 • Adapt onboarding flows for new markets with different regulatory requirements and clinical workflows
 



  





**Who You Are** 




 • 4+ years as a UX/Product Designer in a SaaS, platform, or B2B product company
 



 • Portfolio that demonstrates onboarding, wizard, or setup-flow design — you have designed experiences where the goal is getting users to value as fast as possible
 



 • Strong user research skills — you conduct your own interviews, you don’t just design from briefs
 



 • Proficiency in Figma; experience with design systems and component libraries
 



 • Ability to balance simplicity with the complexity of a configurable healthcare platform
 



 • Comfortable working in a fast-paced squad with direct access to engineers and product management
 



 • AI native in everything you do
 



 • Excellent English; Swedish or a Scandinavian language is a plus
 



  





**Preferably** 




 • Experience designing for healthcare, medtech, or regulated SaaS environments
 



 • Background in PLG or self-service product design
 



 • Understanding of accessibility standards (WCAG) and how they apply to clinical software
 



  





**Why This Role Matters** 




 You are designing the front door to Curoflow’s future. Every clinic that self-onboards without calling support is proof that our platform can scale across Europe. This is the kind of design challenge that shapes a career.
 



  





**What We Offer** 




 • A role where your work has outsized impact — at a company this size, everything you do matters
 



 • Real ownership of your area from day one, with the autonomy to shape how things are done
 



 • A product and mission that genuinely matters — we are making healthcare more accessible across Europe
 



 • Equity participation (stock options) post probation period, because we want everyone to share in what we are building
 



 • A collaborative, low-ego culture where people care deeply about what they’re building
 



 • Expected start date: September–November 2026
 



  





**How to Apply** 




 Send your CV and a short cover letter explaining why this role excites you. We value substance over polish — tell us what you’ve built, not just where you’ve worked.
 



  





*FYI: We are hiring for many roles simultaneously and are committed to finding the right person for each one — not the fastest. Please bear with us if our response times are longer than usual; we promise every application will be reviewed.*

title: UX/UI Designer
description:
Are you ready to bring your innovative perspective and creative skills to Care Technologies within ASSA ABLOY Global Solutions? Join our team in Stockholm, Norrköping, or Halmstad and become part of a collaborative culture that empowers you to grow, contribute, and build a career you can truly be proud of.
   

  

 Care Technologies, part of ASSA ABLOY Global Solutions, develops innovative care technology that empowers caregivers and improves quality of life through trust, integrity, and trusted welfare expertise.
   

  

**What You Would Do As Our UX/UI Designer**
 The UX/UI Designer is responsible for making sure the company’s digital products are easy, clear, and safe to use. The role focuses on understanding how care professionals actually work and then designing interfaces that help them do their job smoothly, without confusion or frustration. The designer works closely with product managers and developers and helps shape consistent user experiences across several products as they grow into scalable, global platforms.
   

  

 In this role you will report to the Techlead and PO QIACCESS.
   

  

  

  

 You would also:
   

  

* Understand user needs by talking to users, observing how they work, and identifying usability problems.
* Design clear user flows, wireframes, and prototypes for web and mobile applications.
* Turn business requirements and technical constraints into simple, intuitive design solutions.
* Work closely with developers and product managers to make sure designs are implemented correctly.
* Ensure usability, accessibility, and consistency across multiple products and platforms.


**The Skills And Experience You Need**
 We are looking for someone with:
   

  

* 3+ years of experience working as a UX Designer, UI Designer, or Product Designer in digital product teams.
* Experience designing web and mobile applications, preferably systems or tools used in professional/work environments.
* Strong understanding of user‑centred design, including user research, usability testing, and iterative design.
* Practical skills in creating user flows, wireframes, prototypes, and clear interface designs.
* Experience working closely with product managers and developers in agile or product‑driven teams.


 The role requires someone who is curious and genuinely interested in understanding users and their everyday challenges. Experience of working with AI solutions, as well as a strong personal interest in the development and application of AI, is highly meritorious. This interest is central to the role, as it is important that the person is motivated to be part of and actively contribute to the journey of our new Global Offering business unit, where AI plays an increasingly important role in shaping future offerings.
   

  

 The person needs to be structured and able to maintain an overview while working on several products in parallel. Strong communication skills are essential, as the designer must clearly explain design decisions to developers, product managers, and other stakeholders. The ideal person is collaborative, open to feedback, and comfortable adjusting designs based on input, data, and user insights. As the work is carried out in an international environment, the person also needs to feel confident communicating and collaborating in English and enjoy working across teams and cultures.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 We’re passionate about providing amazing opportunities and benefits, so you can continue and progress a lifelong career with us – here’s what we have to offer:
   

  

* Learning and career development opportunities, whether it’s online learning, management training or enhancing your skills.
* A competitive salary and incentive schemes.
* While the office will be your workplace, working from home can be agreed with your manager.
* Flexible working hours.


**We review applications regularly, so don't wait**
 We are building diverse, inclusive teams, and encourage applications from everyone who can see themselves working with us. Just set up your profile and apply here. To make sure your personal data is safe, we don’t look at any applications sent by email or post. If you have any questions about the role or the process, email Mona Yusefi, Talent Acquisition Business Partner, at mona.yusefi@assaabloy.com
   

  

 Depending on the risk profile for the role, a background screening will need to be performed. Final candidates may therefore be subjected to a background screening. The performance of the background check is subject to consent and based on our Applicant Privacy Notice.
   

  

 Let’s create a safer and more open world - together!
   

  

 To find out more about us, visit www.assaabloy.com
   

  

 https://www.assaabloyglobalsolutions.com/en/our-solutions/senior-care
   

  

**We are the ASSA ABLOY Group**
 Our people have made us the global leader in access solutions. In return, we open doors for them wherever they go. With nearly 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries, we help billions of people experience a more open world. Our innovations make all sorts of spaces – physical and virtual – safer, more secure, and easier to access.
   

  

 As an employer, we value results – not titles, or backgrounds. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally.
   

  

 As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.

title: Chief Design Officer
description:
**The vision**
 We build ventures the way the future already imagines them.
   

  

 The Venture Engine is an AI Operating System for creation, a digital twin, a way of doing business, a start of owning personal memory. The Venture Engine is the intelligence. The canvas where the creator meets himself and the creation.
   

  

**The role**
 Chief Design Officer, Voice, Brand, Marketing etc
   

  

 You become the main designer across every venture we produce inside the studio + the chief designer of the Venture Engine itself.
   

  

 Two areas. One vision. You hold both.
   

  

**Who We Are Looking For**
 Someone who knows tech. Someone who knows design. Someone who knows intelligence workflows.
   

  

 Someone who can take a product from idea to operation. A creative director who can both think and do. You think in systems. You see design in direction and ownership.
   

  

**The deal**
 No salary until the company is funded. ESOP/sweat equity allocation reflects the contribution. Senior leadership role.
   

  

 Stockholm based. You work close to the studio.
   

  

**About Spucce Venture**
 Spucce is a venture studio. We build companies through the Venture Engine. We unlock the creator through the creation. Our mission is to build the digital twin of creation itself.
   

  

 We are a pre-revenue venture, some investors aligned, we are in the product build.
   

  

 Join if you feel the call.

title: Design Director (visual/digital)
description:
Above is looking for a Design Director to join our creative team based in our Stockholm studio. This is a permanent full-time role.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a Visual Design Director you will be a key player in driving cutting-edge design and innovation projects for some of the world’s most exciting brands. You will help us identify and secure new commercial opportunities, acting as a strategic partner for new and existing clients.
   

  

 With a high level of conceptual thinking, you will have a direct impact in shaping excellent project deliveries through craft and creativity, while also shaping our culture, team capabilities, and ways of working across disciplines.
   

  

 Our work is exciting and diverse in nature, spanning digital experiences such as websites, apps, and HMI. We collaborate across disciplines to create impact across all organizational levels and future horizons — from category-defining hero products to multidimensional digital ecosystems.
   

  

**What We Are Looking For**
 We are looking for an inspiring, forward-thinking Design Director who demonstrates excellence in craft, creativity, leadership, and emerging technologies:
   

  

* Forward-thinking approach to digital product experiences, with a keen interest in emerging trends and future developments
* Holistic thinker with strong conceptualization skills and critical-thinking abilities, comfortable leading conversations with stakeholders across design, technology, and business
* Demonstrated commercial experience in selling impactful digital experience projects — ideally supported by a strong professional network
* Strong storytelling and client leadership, with the ability to clearly communicate ideas and thought processes to both peers and clients
* Preferably 10+ years of professional experience, including familiarity with fast-paced agency environments and workflows
* Ability to lead, mentor, and grow multidisciplinary design teams, fostering creative excellence, psychological safety, and high performance
* Ability to lead clients through complex challenges and structure design processes that enable diverse teams to succeed
* Aesthetic sensibility in harmony with a thoughtful, user-centered approach to design, business, and technology
* Experience using — or actively driving — AI-enabled design workflows to explore ideas faster, prototype more intelligently, and elevate creative and strategic outcomes
* Ability to translate emerging AI capabilities into meaningful design direction, team practices, and client value
* A humble, self-propelled, and collaborative team player who feels at home in multi-competence project constellations


**A Bit About Above**
 We are a Scandinavian innovation agency dedicated to driving positive change through the integration of design, strategy, and technology. Our creative 360-approach allows us to break down boundaries between the physical and digital, while fusing hardware and software into meaningful experiences.
   

  

 We work with leading global brands, local Scandinavian heroes, and a fantastic collection of startups. We’re a team of warm, welcoming, dedicated professionals with diverse international backgrounds. In everything we do, we strive for world-class results and believe you share that mindset.
   

  

 Join a team that values collaboration, creativity, and tangible impact through thoughtful design.
   

  

**Join our team**
 Please submit your portfolio, CV, and personal letter.
   

  

 We welcome international applications and are generally able to assist with work permits and relocation.

title: Design System Intern
description:
We’re looking for a
 **Design System Intern** 
 to join our Stockholm team (hybrid possible) for a 6 month period.
   

  

 We are on a journey to modernize our front-end platform, and the heart of this initiative is our design system. Your mission will be to help us make our existing system slimmer, more accessible, and more intuitive for both designers/developers and end-users.
   

  

 This is a fantastic opportunity to gain hands-on experience, working closely with our Lead Product Designer and front-end team to shape the very foundation of our user experience.
   

  

 While the core of this role is Design Systems, we are a collaborative team. For the right candidate, there will be plenty of opportunities to dive into end-to-end UX projects, taking features from research and wireframing to final handoff.
   

  

**What You’ll Get To Do**
* Redesign: Tackle key components in Figma, focusing on creating accessible, user-centered, and pixel-perfect designs.
* Collaborate: Work directly with front-end developers to support the successful implementation of your redesigned components.
* Define & Document: Define component behaviors and create clear, supportive documentation to ensure everyone knows how and when to use them.
* Refine: Contribute to the overall goal of streamlining our UI library, making it leaner and more efficient.


**Who You Are**
* You have a good visual eye and a passion for pixel-perfect design.
* You are structured, organized, and open to receiving and acting on feedback.
* You have a genuine interest in accessibility (WCAG) and user-centered design.
* You are familiar with Figma and have a solid grasp of design principles.
* (Optional) You are curious about what it’s like to work for a B2B SaaS company in the cybersecurity field.


**What We Offer**
* A 6 month hands-on internship.
* A hybrid work setup based in our Stockholm office.
* Close mentorship and collaboration with senior designers and developers.
* A unique chance to learn about cybersecurity! (You’re welcome to join internal presentations and activities).


**How The Process Works**
* Send your CV and portfolio (if you have one) for an initial review.
* Have a first “meet and greet” interview.
* Participate in an in-depth interview to discuss your skills.


**Ready to Make Your Mark on Our UI?**
 If you’re excited about contributing to a significant design initiative and gaining experience in UI library design, we’d love to hear from you! We believe in fostering a supportive and inclusive environment where you can learn, contribute, and grow.
   

  

**Location and Start Date**
 This position is for the Stockholm office. We would like to see you in the office a few days per week. We are looking for someone to start at the end of summer.
   

  

 Detectify sets a new standard for advanced application security testing, challenging traditional Dynamic Application Security Testing (DAST) by providing evolving coverage of each and every exposed asset across the changing attack surface. AppSec teams trust Detectify to expose how attackers will exploit their Internet-facing applications.
   

  

 The Detectify platform automates continuous real-world, payload-based attacks fuelled by its global community of elite ethical hackers into its own expert-built engines, exposing critical weaknesses before it's too late. Go hack yourself.

title: Business Analyst
description:
**Looking for a workplace for the future?**
 At Telenor, you own your career. Here, you’ll have the opportunity to make the most of your dreams and expertise while contributing to technological innovations that are barely even imagined today. Innovations that we know will change the map for how we communicate and live our connected lives in the future. Are you looking for a workplace where you can make a difference in what matters most – relationships between people? Then you are welcome to Telenor.
   

  

 We are now looking for Business Analyst to join our Digital Channels
   

  

**How You’ll Make a Difference With Us**
 As a Business Analyst within Digital Channels, you will play a key role in shaping seamless and customer‑centric digital experiences across Telenor.se and our Progressive Web App (Web, iOS, Android). You will act as the bridge between business needs and technical delivery, ensuring that our digital journeys are intuitive, reliable, and continuously improving.
   

  

 Your main responsibilities include:
   

  

* Driving requirement modelling and refinement within agile squads
* Translating business needs into clear user stories and acceptance criteria
* Supporting both discovery and delivery, ensuring smooth handover to development
* Acting as a requirement lead in cross-functional initiatives
* Driving improvements in purchase flows and logged-in/MyPages/app experiences
* Analysing customer behaviour, funnel data, and feedback to optimise conversion and self‑service
* Contributing to the continued evolution of our Progressive Web App across platforms


 You will work closely with Product Owners, developers, QA, Scrum Masters, UX designers, architects, and business stakeholders. Your work directly impacts how millions of customers interact with Telenor - making their digital experience smoother, safer, and more worry-free.
   

  

**Are you the one we’re looking for?**
 We’re looking for someone who is curious, analytical, and collaborative - always on their toes, with a genuine desire to learn and develop in order to meet our customers ever-changing needs, today and tomorrow, and who is motivated by creating real customer value in a fast-changing environment.
   

  

 Must-have requirements
   

  

* Experience working with requirements in software development contexts
* Experience from agile product teams (Scrum/Kanban)
* Strong analytical skills and ability to translate complex needs into clear requirements
* Experience working with digital channels (web or app), preferably within e‑commerce or self‑service


**Preferred Experience**
* Experience within telecom or subscription-based services
* Understanding of Progressive Web Apps (PWA) and mobile UX
* Knowledge of tracking, funnel optimisation, or A/B testing
* Experience with accessibility standards or CMS tools (e.g. Contentful)


 We believe in potential, and what matters most is your mindset, adaptability, and willingness to learn.
   

  

**Our promise to you**
*We are better together* 
 . Here, you’ll be part of a family-like and inclusive culture, built on strong shared values and leadership that empowers you with both trust and confidence. We believe in enabling each other to act and make decisions, while always having each other’s backs through ups and downs.
   

  

*We support relationships and societies.* 
 Telenor plays a vital role in the society, giving your work a greater purpose. Every day, we create value for millions of people and maintain a customer-first approach where human relationships are at the heart of everything we do.
   

  

*We make room for life.* 
 Work from home up to two days a week, if your role allows it. The rest of the time, we create magic together at the office. Leadership based on trust and flexible working hours helps you balance work and life. We support you through every stage of life with our benefit package, including collective agreements, occupational pensions, wellness allowances, and customized insurance solutions tailored to your needs.
   

  

*We invite you to a career in motion.* 
 Your development is at the center of our culture. We dedicate at least 40 hours per year for you to deepen your expertise, explore new areas, and develop in your role. Through Telenor Academy and other learning initiatives, you’ll have the tools and freedom to advance your career. If you want to broaden your horizons, we are present throughout the Nordics.
   

  

**Apply today!**
 Will you take the next step in your career with us? We look forward to your application! We review applicants on an ongoing basis, so don’t wait—reach out today.
   

  

 If you have any questions or want to know more, feel free to contact the hiring manager
   

  

 Oscar Söderlund at oscar.soderlund@telenor.se. Please note that we cannot accept applications via email.
   

  

**Good to know**
 As part of Telenor’s policy, we conduct background checks on final candidates for all recruitments.

title: PRODUCT MANAGER BOOKING & PAYMENTS
description:
**Product Manager – Booking & Payments**
 SAS is looking for a commercially driven Product Manager to own and evolve a key stage of the digital customer journey across web and app. Sitting in the Digital Sales team within E-Commerce, this role is accountable for the product strategy, roadmap, and revenue outcomes - for the booking and payments stage of the customer journey. The role is working in close collaboration with Digital & IT delivery teams and commercial stakeholders.
   

  

 The PM is the commercial owner of their domain. They define what gets built and why, set the success metrics, and are accountable for the product strategy, roadmap, and revenue outcomes, contributing to making Digital Sales a core growth engine for SAS.
   

  

**Challenges you will work on**
* Own and drive product performance: Accountable for conversion, revenue, and customer experience within your journey stage, proactively identifying and driving opportunities to improve performance and unlock growth
* Define product strategy and priorities: Translate business goals, customer insights, benchmarking, and data analysis into a clear product vision and roadmap, incorporating innovation and emerging technologies (including AI) where they drive measurable value.
* Drive discovery and experimentation: Lead structured discovery and hypothesis-driven development, using data, customer insights, and benchmarking to validate opportunities and solutions through experimentation, including testing new concepts and AI-enabled capabilities
* Translate strategy into execution: Work closely with Product Owners and delivery teams to ensure priorities are clearly defined, well-prepared, and executed with high quality and speed
* Manage trade-offs and stakeholder alignment: Operate in a complex environment, making transparent prioritization decisions and aligning stakeholders around value-driven outcomes
* Measure impact and close the loop: Define success metrics, track performance, and ensure delivered initiatives translate into measurable business value.


**The Team**
 You will work as part of a cross-functional product environment together with Product Owners, designers, engineers, architects, and business stakeholders. The setup is highly collaborative and distributed across Commercial and Digital & IT, requiring strong communication, trust, and shared ownership of outcomes. You will report to Head of Digital Sales.
   

  

 The team culture emphasizes customer-centricity, learning, empowerment, and continuous improvement. Product Managers are expected to act as internal voices of the customer while enabling teams to deliver value effectively and sustainably.
   

  

**To be successful, we believe you have**
* 5+ years of experience as a Product Manager, with end-to-end ownership across the product lifecycle from discovery and definition to delivery and value realization
* Experience working with checkout and payment flows, including understanding of payment methods, transaction funnels, and factors impacting conversion and payment success rates
* Srong commercial and product acumen, with proven ability to translate business strategy, customer insights, and data into clear product vision, priorities, and roadmaps
* Experience driving product performance, with a solid understanding of key digital KPIs (e.g. conversion, revenue, funnel performance) and how to improve them
* Hands-on experience with product discovery and experimentation, including defining problem statements, hypotheses, success metrics, and validating solutions through data and testing
* Strong prioritization and decision-making skills, balancing customer value, business impact, and technical considerations in complex stakeholder environments
* Experience working in agile product development setups, collaborating effectively with Product Owners, engineering teams, UX/design, and architecture
* Strong analytical and data-driven mindset, with hands-on experience using GA4 (or similar) to analyze funnels, identify opportunities, and drive product decisions
* Ability to operate in a matrix organization, partnering across Commercial and Digital & IT, and navigating dependencies related to architecture, security, and compliance
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to align diverse audiences around product direction and priorities
* Customer-centric and curious mindset, with a focus on challenging assumptions, innovation, and continuous improvement
* Fluency in English; Scandinavian language is a plus
* Experience in digital travel or product-led digital businesses is a strong advantage


**Why SAS?**
 At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:
   

  

* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.
* Work Environment: Our office location in Frösundavik offers a vibrant workspace with a restaurant, café, and easy access to outdoor activities in Hagaparken and Brunnsviken. Engage in running, tennis, outdoor gym sessions, kayaking, and stand-up paddling with equipment available free of charge.
* Convenient Commute: Benefit from a non-stop bus service connecting our office to Solna station, and commuter trains, alongside a network of cycle paths.


**Our Culture at SAS**
 At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. Join us at SAS and be part of shaping the future of aviation!
   

  

**Additional Information**
* Deadline for application: 26/05/2026. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
* Desired start date: As soon as possible.
* Position: Fulltime (100%) starting with a 6-month probation period.
* This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm), and you will be expected to work onsite. Remote work may also be an option, depending on the agreement made with your manager.


 Come and fly with us!

title: Fullstack Backend Data Engineer till aktör inom kollektivtrafik
description:
Vi söker nu en senior och lösningsorienterad Fullstack Backend Data Engineer för ett långsiktigt konsultuppdrag inom kollektivtrafik och samhällsviktig infrastruktur i Stockholm. Uppdraget passar dig som vill vara med och utveckla moderna data- och analysplattformar i Azure-miljö tillsammans med erfarna och agila team.
  
Uppdraget löper från 1 juni 2026 till 31 maj 2027, med möjlighet till förlängning samt upp till 50 % distansarbete.
  
Om rollen
  
Du blir en del av en etablerad Data & Analysorganisation bestående av cirka 50 specialister och konsulter som arbetar i sex agila team. Organisationen driver en omfattande modernisering av det tekniska landskapet med fokus på data, analys och AI, där en modern analysplattform i Azure står i centrum.
  
I rollen arbetar du nära verksamheten och andra utvecklingsteam för att skapa hållbara, skalbara och verksamhetsnära datalösningar. Du kommer att vara drivande inom lösningsdesign och bidra aktivt till kompetensspridning och utveckling av arbetssätt inom teamet.
  
Arbetsuppgifter
  
Designa och utveckla moderna data- och analyslösningar i Azure
  
  

Säkerställa att lösningar möter verksamhetskrav och interna riktlinjer
  
  

Utveckla och förvalta dataflöden, datamodeller och integrationslösningar
  
  

Arbeta med datatransformation och modellering av komplexa datamängder
  
  

Bygga och vidareutveckla lösningar i Azure Synapse, Databricks och/eller Microsoft Fabric
  
  

Utveckla och optimera lösningar i Apache Spark Notebooks
  
  

Hantera informationssäkerhet i samband med implementation av datalösningar
  
  

Utveckla och förvalta CI/CD-pipelines i moderna utvecklingsmiljöer
  
  

Samverka med verksamheten samt andra team inom Data & Analys och IT
  
  

Bidra med mentorskap, kodgranskning och kompetensöverföring inom teamet
  
  

Om dig
  
Vi söker dig som är analytisk, kommunikativ och trygg i rollen som senior Data Engineer. Du har ett starkt tekniskt driv och trivs i komplexa miljöer där du får kombinera utveckling, arkitektur och samarbete med verksamheten.
  
Du har erfarenhet av att arbeta datadrivet i moderna molnplattformar och känner dig bekväm med att ta ansvar för både tekniska vägval och kunskapsdelning inom teamet.
  
Erfarenhet och kompetens
  
Minst 5 års erfarenhet som Data Engineer
  
  

Minst 3 års erfarenhet av utveckling i molnmiljö och organisationsövergripande data- och analysplattformar
  
  

Erfarenhet av Azure Synapse, Databricks och/eller Microsoft Fabric
  
  

Erfarenhet av dataintegrationer i molnbaserade analysplattformar
  
  

Erfarenhet av semantisk modellering i Power BI eller Azure Analysis Services
  
  

Mycket god erfarenhet av utveckling i Apache Spark Notebooks
  
  

Erfarenhet av att översätta verksamhetskrav till dimensionsmodeller
  
  

Erfarenhet av utveckling och förvaltning av CI/CD-pipelines
  
  

Erfarenhet av mentorskap, kodgranskning och teknisk coachning
  
  

Erfarenhet av Data Lakehouse-arkitektur är meriterande
  
  

Erfarenhet av SQL Server och/eller Power BI Report Server i on-prem-miljö är meriterande
  
  

Erfarenhet av prestandaoptimering i Sparkmotorer och semantiska modeller är meriterande
  
  

Uppdraget
  
För det här uppdraget anställs du som konsult på Digitalenta. Vi erbjuder alla våra konsulter ett gediget friskvårdsbidrag, försäkringar, förmånligt pensionssparande, konsultträffar och givetvis en engagerad konsultchef som finns tillgänglig för dig under hela anställningsperioden.

title: Data Engineer till aktör inom kollektivtrafik
description:
Vi söker en driven och lösningsorienterad Data Engineer för ett spännande konsultuppdrag inom offentlig sektor och kollektivtrafik i Stockholm.
  
Uppdraget löper från den 1 juni 2026 till den 31 maj 2027, med möjlighet till förlängning. Rollen erbjuder upp till 50 % distansarbete.
  
Om rollen
  
Du kommer att ingå i en modern Data & Analys organisation med fokus på att utveckla framtidens datadrivna arbetssätt och analysförmågor. Teamet arbetar agilt och nära verksamheten för att skapa skalbara och hållbara lösningar inom data, analys och AI.
  
I rollen kommer du att arbeta i ett domänorienterat team där du ansvarar för både nyutveckling och vidareutveckling av befintliga lösningar i en modern Azure-baserad analysplattform. Du samarbetar tätt med verksamheten och bidrar aktivt till kompetensdelning, förbättrade arbetssätt och teknisk utveckling.
  
Arbetsuppgifter
  
Utveckla och förvalta data- och analyslösningar i Azure-miljö
  
  

Designa och implementera dataintegrationer mellan olika system och plattformar
  
  

Arbeta med ETL/ELT-processer och datatransformationer
  
  

Hantera och modellera komplexa datamängder för analys och rapportering
  
  

Utveckla lösningar i Microsoft Azure Synapse, Databricks och/eller Microsoft Fabric
  
  

Arbeta med Pythonutveckling i Apache Spark Notebooks
  
  

Säkerställa informationssäkerhet i samband med implementationer
  
  

Bidra till utveckling av arbetssätt, processer och tekniska riktlinjer
  
  

Samarbeta med teammedlemmar och verksamhetsintressenter
  
  

Bidra till kunskapsspridning och teknisk coachning inom teamet
  
  

Om dig
  
Vi söker dig som är analytisk, kommunikativ och trivs i en miljö där samarbete och kunskapsdelning är en naturlig del av vardagen. Du har erfarenhet av moderna dataplattformar och ett stort intresse för att skapa effektiva, hållbara och verksamhetsnära lösningar.
  
Du är van att arbeta självständigt samtidigt som du uppskattar att arbeta i agila team med många kontaktytor. Vidare har du ett strukturerat arbetssätt och ett starkt fokus på kvalitet och långsiktighet.
  
Erfarenhet och kompetens
  
Minst 2 års erfarenhet som Data Engineer
  
  

Erfarenhet av utveckling av organisationsövergripande data- och analysplattformar
  
  

Minst 2 års erfarenhet av Azure Synapse, Databricks och/eller Microsoft Fabric
  
  

Erfarenhet av dataintegrationer i molnbaserade analysplattformar
  
  

Minst 2 års erfarenhet av ETL/ELT-processer, varav minst 1 år i molnmiljö
  
  

Erfarenhet av utveckling i Python i Apache Spark Notebooks
  
  

Erfarenhet av dimensionsmodellering
  
  

Erfarenhet av arbete i agila utvecklingsteam
  
  

God förståelse för informationssäkerhet och datakvalitet
  
  

Meriterande
  
Erfarenhet av semantisk modellering i Power BI eller Azure Analysis Services
  
  

Erfarenhet av Microsoft on-prem-miljöer såsom SQL Server och/eller Power BI Report Server
  
  

Erfarenhet av prestandaoptimering i Sparkmotorer eller semantiska modeller i Fabric/Power BI
  
  

Uppdraget
  
För det här uppdraget anställs du som konsult på Digitalenta. Vi erbjuder alla våra konsulter ett gediget friskvårdsbidrag, försäkringar, förmånligt pensionssparande, konsultträffar och givetvis en engagerad konsultchef som finns tillgänglig för dig under hela anställningsperioden.

title: Senior lösningsarkitekt inom MedTech & Life Science
description:
Public & Health på CGI i Göteborg växer och söker en senior lösningsarkitekt som vill vara med och utveckla vår affär inom MedTech och Life Science. Vi söker dig som kombinerar senior arkitekturkompetens med stark verksamhetsförståelse och som trivs i rollen som rådgivare, brygga och drivande kraft i komplexa transformationer. Det här är inte en renodlat teknisk arkitektroll, utan en verksamhetsnära konsultroll där du hjälper kunder att förstå vägval, forma lösningar och skapa förutsättningar för genomförbar förändring.  

MedTech och Life Science står inför stora förändringar där AI, data, modernisering av systemlandskap, regulatoriska krav och ökade krav på kvalitet, spårbarhet och informationssäkerhet behöver gå hand i hand. Vi söker dig som inte bara kan designa lösningar, utan också förstår kundens verksamhet, kan driva dialog med beslutsfattare och omsätta komplexa behov till arkitektur, vägval och genomförbara lösningsförslag.  

Det här är en roll för dig som vill vara med och forma hur vi utvecklar vårt erbjudande inom MedTech och Life Science i Göteborg. Du får kombinera seniort kundarbete med ansvar för att driva affärsutveckling, paketera nya erbjudanden, skapa nya kundmöjligheter och bidra till CGI:s långsiktiga position inom reglerade miljöer.
  

Vi tror att du är trygg, rådgivande och affärsmässig, med förmåga att bygga förtroende, vägleda och förankra samt skapa riktning tillsammans med kunden. Du är prestigelös i samarbetet och har erfarenheten att göra komplexa vägval begripliga, vägleda kunden och skapa trygghet i viktiga beslut.

**Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter**

* Leda arbete för digitala lösningar inom MedTech och Life Science.
* Ta fram målarkitektur, lösningsförslag, roadmaps och beslutsunderlag.
* Översätta verksamhetsbehov, regulatoriska krav och tekniska förutsättningar till genomförbara lösningar.
* Arbeta med modernisering av systemlandskap, data, integration och plattformar på ett sätt som skapar tydligt verksamhetsvärde.
* Agera rådgivare till kundens ledning, IT-organisation och verksamhetsrepresentanter i förstudier, upphandlingar, systeminföranden och transformationer.


- Driva vidareutvecklingen av CGI:s erbjudande inom reglerade miljöer, MedTech, Life Science och verksamhetsnära arkitektur, inklusive paketering av nya erbjudanden och stöd i sälj- och kunddialoger.**Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll**

* Minst 8–10 års relevant erfarenhet som konsult, arkitekt eller senior rådgivare inom IT, digital transformation, verksamhetsutveckling eller systemnära förändring.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet från MedTech eller Life Science, exempelvis läkemedel, medicinteknik, laboratorieverksamhet, R&D, kvalitet, produktion eller regulatoriska miljöer.
* Erfarenhet av arkitekturarbete inom ett eller flera områden, exempelvis lösningsarkitektur, verksamhetsarkitektur, data, integration, plattformar, modernisering eller verksamhetskritiska systemlandskap.
* Förmåga att arbeta nära verksamhet, IT, kvalitet och regulatoriska funktioner och omsätta komplexa behov till vägval, arkitektur och genomförbara lösningsförslag.
* Trygghet i kunddialoger, workshopledning och beslutsforum, med förmåga att leda dialoger på ett strukturerat sätt, skapa förtroende och driva affärsutveckling genom nya möjligheter, paketerade erbjudanden och aktivt säljarbete.
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.

  

Vi värdesätter olika erfarenheter och bakgrunder. Har du en stark grund inom MedTech eller Life Science, arkitektur och kundnära rådgivning, ser vi gärna din ansökan även om din erfarenhet inte täcker varje punkt ovan fullt ut. Även erfarenhet från IT inom vård, offentlig sektor eller annan reglerad verksamhet är relevant.  

Meriterande är:
  

* Erfarenhet av AI, machine learning, GenAI, data governance eller AI-governance i reglerade miljöer.
* Erfarenhet av LIMS, ELN, ERP, CRM, QMS eller andra verksamhetskritiska system inom MedTech eller Life Science.
* Erfarenhet av moln, hybridarkitektur, integrationer, API:er, masterdata eller dataplattformar.
* Erfarenhet av informationssäkerhet, cybersäkerhet, data privacy eller data sovereignty.. Certifiering eller erfarenhet av TOGAF, SAFe, ITIL, Azure, AWS, Microsoft, Salesforce, ServiceNow eller liknande.

  

Varför CGI?  

Hos oss får du global styrka, lokal närvaro och stora möjligheter att utvecklas - både som specialist och generalist. Vi erbjuder flexibla arbetsformer, balans i livet och attraktiva förmåner såsom föräldralön upp till ca 90 %, aktiesparprogram med 3% extra av månadslönen, generöst friskvårdsbidrag, kollektivavtal, tjänstepension och försäkringar.  

Vi arbetar långsiktigt, värdesätter kvalitet och innovation och tror på kraften i starka team. Här får du vara med och skapa värde på riktigt.  

Vill du veta mer? Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig! Om du undrar över något, skicka gärna dina funderingar till Matilda Holst på Matilda.Holst@cgi.com. Läs mer om CGI på vår hemsida: www.cgi.se. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!  

  

  

#LI-HW1  

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**  

  

Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.  

  

Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.  

  

Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.  

  

Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
  

  

Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.
company_description: Founded in 1976, CGI is among the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: Atlassian Solution Architect
description:
**Introduction to Eficode**
---------------------------


We’re building the future of software development - driving innovation across Cloud, DevOps, Agile, Service Management, and AI-powered transformation. Our mission is to help organizations evolve into truly software-driven enterprises, empowering them to deliver faster, smarter, and more sustainably through modern technology and intelligent automation.


At Eficode, we help some of the world’s leading organisations modernise the way they build software by combining DevOps culture, platform engineering, AI-assisted software development, and cloud-native tooling. From intelligent automation to agentic workflows and AI-enhanced SDLC practices, we are at the forefront of helping teams transform how software is delivered.


As an Atlassian Platinum Solution Partner, we have been recognised multiple times as Atlassian Partner of the Year, most recently for Software Solutions, 2026. We are also proud to be a two-time GitHub Partner of the Year in EMEA, a GitLab Select Partner, and an Azure Managed Service Provider.


With over 600 experts across 10 countries, we bring together leading talent from the Nordics, continental Europe, the UK, and the Americas.

**Role purpose**
----------------


As an Atlassian Solution Architect at Eficode, you won’t just be configuring tools - you’ll help shape the future of software development for our customers.


You’ll work closely with enterprise organisations to design and implement modern, scalable development platforms and collaborative ways of working across the software development lifecycle. While Atlassian technologies will be at the core of your work, you’ll also have the opportunity to work across the wider DevOps and AI ecosystem, including GitHub, GitLab, Azure, and more.


This role is ideal for someone who enjoys combining technical expertise with consultative problem-solving, and who is excited by the evolving world of AI-assisted development, intelligent automation, and platform engineering.

**Role responsibilities**
-------------------------

**Your main responsibilities as our Atlassian Solution Architect will include (but won’t be limited to):**

* Leading discovery workshops and designing enterprise-scale Atlassian solutions across Jira, Confluence, and Jira Service Management
* Acting as a technical lead for migrations from Atlassian Server/Data Center to Atlassian Cloud
* Designing customized integrations within modern DevOps toolchains such as GitHub, GitLab and related systems as e.g. ServiceNow.
* Helping customers modernise their SDLC through automation, AI-assisted workflows, and platform engineering best practices
* Supporting customers in adopting modern ways of working across Agile, Service Management and DevOps
* Building advanced automations and customisations using tools such as Forge, Groovy, Python, or JavaScript
* Collaborating with cross-functional Eficode teams across Cloud, AI, DevOps, and Managed Services
* Sharing knowledge internally and mentoring junior consultants within the Eficode community

**Role Requirements**
---------------------

**You will make a great match for this role if you have:**

* Previous experience working in consulting, solution architecture, technical advisory, or customer-facing technical roles
* Experience working with cloud technologies, enterprise environments, or digital transformation initiatives
* Demonstrated experience with Atlassian Cloud administration, migrations, and integrations within modern DevOps ecosystems
* A solid understanding of software development practices, CI/CD, DevOps, and platform engineering principles, with experience using at least one scripting language or automation platform
* Excellent communication skills in English
* A proactive, consultative, and collaborative mindset, with the ability to communicate with technical and non-technical stakeholders
* Curiosity about emerging technologies, including AI-assisted software development and intelligent automation

**Nice-to-have’s**
------------------

**It would be an added bonus if you have:**

* Atlassian certifications (ACP)
* Experience with GitHub, GitLab, Azure or AWS
* Experience with AI-assisted development tooling or intelligent automation workflows
* Knowledge of ITSM frameworks, Agile at scale, or DevOps transformation
* Experience working in consultancy environments
* Swedish language skills for customer-facing work in Stockholm would be beneficial

**About you**
-------------

**The type of person we’re looking for is someone who is:**

* Curious about emerging technologies and excited by the future of AI-powered software development
* Proactive and comfortable taking ownership of customer challenges
* Collaborative and passionate about sharing knowledge
* Adaptable and confident navigating complex technical environments
* Interested in continuous learning and personal development

**What’s in it for you?**
-------------------------

**Eficode offers a range of perks and benefits for employees, including:**

* The opportunity to work with some of the most recognised companies in the Nordics and Europe
* Exposure to a broad ecosystem of technologies beyond Atlassian, including GitHub, GitLab, AWS, Azure, and AI-enabled SDLC tooling
* Upskill time and certification support
* A collaborative and supportive culture where diverse expertise and perspectives complement each other
* Flexible hybrid working
* A social and international work environment with regular meetups, knowledge-sharing sessions, and events
* Opportunities to grow your career across consulting, architecture, AI, cloud, and platform engineering


To find out more about life at Eficode, and hear what our people think about us, click here.

**How to Apply**
----------------


If this sounds like the right opportunity for you, we’d love to hear from you - apply today!


A member of our Talent Acquisition team will review your application and, if your profile is a match, will be in contact to organise an initial screening call. If you are not selected to move forward in the process, we will also make sure to keep you informed.


This is a hybrid role based in Stockholm, with an expectation of approximately 2–3 days per week on-site.

***DEI Statement***
-------------------

*At Eficode we are committed to offering an inclusive recruitment process and equal opportunities for all applicants. We are dedicated to creating a work environment that embraces diversity, inclusion, and respect for all employees. We believe that our differences make us better.*

*We recognise that by having diverse perspectives, skills, ages, genders, backgrounds, and cultures, we will better drive our customers forward and innovate in our field.*

*To ensure a fair recruitment process, please refrain from sharing unnecessary personal information or an image of yourself in your job application.*

***Salary development***
------------------------

*At Eficode, we believe your compensation should reflect the impact you make and how you grow along the way. Your salary develops through regular check-ins with your team lead, where we look at things like your skills, experience, client work, feedback, and overall contribution — both to your projects and to our culture.*

*As a consultancy, it’s natural that factors like time spent on billable client work are part of the picture - but so are your development, collaboration, and everyday efforts that drive value. We also carry out a company-wide salary review once a year.*

*On top of your salary, we offer a broad mix of benefits, both financial and non-financial, to support your well-being, work-life balance, and professional growth.*

***Beware of recruitment scams***
