title: ETL-uvecklare
description:
May 12, 2026
Full Time
Stockholm
Posted 3 hours ago
Vi söker en **ETL-uvecklare** för ett uppdrag som utförs i **Stockholm (Onsite).**


**Uppdragsbeskrivning**



Vi söker en **ETL-utvecklare** som ska arbeta med att säkerställa dataöverföring från ett analysdatalager i en organisation. Rollen innebär att designa, utveckla, dokumentera och förvalta databasstrukturer och ETL-flöden samt säkerställa hög datakvalitet.



Du ansvarar för leveranser och genomför enhetstester av både egen och andras kod. I uppdraget ingår även att bidra till utveckling av standarder, lösningsförslag och målarkitekturer i nära samarbete med utveckling, test, plattform och infrastruktur.



Arbetet sker i en teknisk miljö med många integrationer och fokus på moderna arbetssätt inom datahantering och systemutveckling.


**Kravprofil:**


**Obligatoriska krav:**


* Du uppnår kompetensnivå 4
* Du har minst 5 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av ETL-utveckling
* Du har minst 5 års dokumenterad erfarenhet att arbeta som Datalager arkitekt
* Du har minst 5 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av databasdesign
* Du har minst 5 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av SQL, logisk datamodellering och dimensionsmodellering
* Du har minst 2 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av DevOps och versionshantering (Git)
* Du har förmåga att kommunicera på svenska i både tal och skrift


**Bör-krav:**


* Du bör ha erfarenhet av databasdesign i Oracle Exadata och/eller Oracle RDBMS
* Du bör ha erfarenhet av att jobba med Data Vault och i verktyget Informatica (lokal installation)
* Du bör ha erfarenhet av arbete i komplexa informations- och integrationslandskap inom större organisationer samt erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt såsom Scrum och/eller Kanban

  



### **Job Features**


Job Category Data Engineerig

title: Mid-Market Account Executive Northern Europe (Remote UK)
description:
**The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination.**


n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact.


Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve:

* Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders
* Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects
* Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100)
* Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation

  

That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what *you* can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register.


We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us.

**About the role**
------------------


n8n is looking for a Mid-Market Account Executive to own and grow a defined territory across Northern Europe (UK&I, Nordics & Benelux), building pipeline, landing net-new logos, and expanding accounts.


You’ll run a full-cycle, consultative sales motion focused on mid-market organisations (100–2,500 employees): uncovering technical and business needs, engaging multiple stakeholders, guiding evaluations, and closing high-impact deals.


This role is ideal for someone who can sell to technical buyers (developers are our ICP), thrives in fast-growing environments, and uses a structured methodology (e.g. MEDDIC/MEDDPICC) to drive consistent outcomes.

**Why this role is exciting:**
------------------------------

* **Ownership**: You’ll run the full sales cycle end-to-end (average 2–3 months), from discovery to negotiation and close. No hand-offs or silos, just clear ownership and impact.
* **Momentum**: We’re seeing a sharp rise in demand from mid-sized technical teams who want more control over their automation infrastructure, the perfect ICP for our self-hosted Enterprise plan.
* **Manage and expand**: This is a high-impact role where outbound drives growth. You’ll build strategic relationships and own deals end-to-end.
* **Strategic Impact**: You’ll build relationships with decision-makers across DevOps, Engineering, and IT. These are often hands-on, technical buyers, looking for trusted advisors, not just sales reps.
* **Growth Environment**: You’ll be at the heart of a startup scaling from Series A to B — where your feedback, creativity, and execution will directly shape how we build and sell.
* **Collaborative Culture**: Work closely with Product, Solution Engineers, Marketing, and Customer Success, a cross-functional team that moves fast and shares success.

**What you’ll be doing:**
-------------------------

* Own the **entire sales process** — from qualification to close — with average land deals of €35–45K ARR.
* **Test and scale outbound tactics** to build a repeatable and sustainable pipeline.
* Build long-term **strategic relationships** with engineering leaders and other technical buyers.
* Drive **sales efficiency** by improving internal processes, content, and tooling.
* Collaborate closely with Product to share customer feedback and influence roadmap decisions.

**What we’re looking for:**
---------------------------

* 4+ years of sales experience at a BtoB SaaS company
* Mid-Market experience: You’re used to closing 4 figure deals within the Northern Europe market.
* **High quota:** You've held a +600K ARR quota in your current / previous roles.
* **Top performer:** You have a track record of being in the top 10% of your sales team.
* **Highly tech-savvy:** You’ve sold to highly technical stakeholders (IT operations, devops, secops, software engineers) and/or know how to code and/or have an engineering background.
* **Entrepreneurial mindset:** You spot opportunities for growth, suggest a plan to address them, and execute it. You’re able to work independently without a ton of established structure or processes.
* **Hunter mindset:** You have a proven track record in outbound sales.
* **Bonus points:** You have experience with open source, developer tools, PLG companies and/or startups at Series A-C stage.

*n8n is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.*

*We can sponsor visas to Germany; for any other country, you need to have existing right to work.*

***Our company language is English.***

*You care about diversity and inclusion? We do too! Check out our* *Diversity, Inclusion and Belonging initiatives at n8n* *(**https://www.notion.so/n8n/Diversity-inclusion-and-belonging-n8n-c1bec2fff536422d868b1a438d990e35**).*

***Location disclaimer:*** *If you see multiple job postings for the same role, it is most likely because we're hiring remotely for this role and posting in different locations to make sure every potential candidate can see the role. Please apply to the location you're the most likely to work from in the future.*

**Benefits**
------------

* **Competitive compensation** – We offer fair and attractive pay.
* **Ownership** – Our core value is to “empower others,” and we mean it—you’ll get a slice of n8n with equity.
* **Work/life balance** – We work hard but ensure you have time to recharge:


	+ **Europe:** 30 days of vacation, plus public holidays wherever you are.
	+ **US:** 20 vacation days, 8 sick days, plus public holidays wherever you are.
* **Health & wellness** –


	+ **Europe:** We provide benefits according to local country norms.\*
	+ **US**: Multiple low-premium, low-deductible medical plans with coverage for individuals and families—plus a no-cost premium HDHP option with a pre-seeded HSA—along with dental and vision coverage.
* **Future planning** –


	+ **Europe:** We provide pension contributions according to local country norms.\*
	+ **US:** 401(k) retirement plan with a 4% employer match.
* **Financial security** –


	+ **Europe:** We provide benefits according to local country norms.\*
	+ **US:** Company-paid short-term and long-term disability insurance, plus life insurance to support you and your loved ones.
* **Career growth** – We hire rising stars who grow with us! You’ll get €1K (or equivalent) per year to spend on courses, books, events, or coaching to level up your skills.
* **A passionate team** – We love our product, and we prove it with regular hackathons where we see who can build the coolest thing with it!
* **Remote-first** – Our team works remotely across Europe, with regular off-sites for team bonding. Some roles, like sales in the US, are hybrid—please check the job description.
* **Giving back** – We're big fans of open source, and you'll get $100 per month to support projects you care about.
* **AI enablement –** We believe in working smarter—everyone gets an unlimited AI budget to explore and use the best tools to boost productivity and creativity.
* **Transparency** – We all know what everyone’s working on, how the company is doing—the whole shebang.
* **An ambitious but kind culture** – People love working here—our eNPS for 2024 is 94!
* *Country-specific details are provided in your contract.*

title: SAP EAM Tester – S/4HANA
description:
About the Role
  
We are looking for an experienced SAP EAM Tester to strengthen a team supporting ongoing and upcoming S/4HANA transformation initiatives. In this role, you will take hands-on ownership of testing activities within SAP Plant Maintenance, ensuring quality across implementation, migration, and integration deliveries. You will work closely with business stakeholders, developers, and cross-functional teams throughout the full testing lifecycle.
  
Responsibilities
  
Plan, design, and execute test activities within SAP EAM/PM as part of S/4HANA implementation and migration projects
  
Validate work order processes, integration flows, and SAP Fiori applications to ensure functional correctness and stability
  
Collaborate with functional consultants, developers, and business stakeholders to define test scope, acceptance criteria, and test strategies
  
Manage defects, conduct regression testing, and support go-live preparations
  
Work within Microsoft DevOps to track test progress, manage test cases, and report quality status
  
Contribute to continuous improvement of test processes in an agile delivery environment
  
Support blueprinting, user acceptance testing, training, and documentation activities
  
  

Requirements
  
Minimum 10 years of hands-on experience as a tester in SAP EAM projects
  
Proven experience in S/4HANA implementations and migrations
  
Solid practical experience with SAP Fiori applications
  
Strong knowledge of integration flows to and from SAP systems
  
Deep expertise in work order processes within SAP PM
  
Familiarity with SAP MM-related processes
  
Fluency in both Swedish and English, written and spoken
  
  

Meriting
  
Experience working with Microsoft DevOps in SAP projects
  
Experience in agile teams following Scrum methodologies
  
Background in collaborating closely with business stakeholders, developers, and test teams in cross-functional setups
  
  

**Start:** Omgående Duration: Until 2026-12 Location: Solna / Trollhättan (hybrid)
  
About Rasulson Consulting
  
Rasulson Consulting is a specialized staffing and recruitment firm within the IT sector. We partner with established technology companies as well as innovative startups to offer attractive career opportunities for professionals looking to grow within digital development and IT. With our strong technical expertise and extensive network, we effectively match the right consultant with the right assignment. At Rasulson Consulting, you will receive personalized guidance, ongoing feedback, and the opportunity to take the next step in your career.

title: Platform Engineer
description:
Är du redo att forma framtidens IT tillsammans med några av branschens vassaste konsulter? Accelerate växer och vi söker fler Platform Engineers som vill vara med och bygga smarta, hållbara och säkra lösningar i teknikens absoluta framkant.
  
Din roll Som en del av vårt DevOps-team får du arbeta med marknadsledande kunder och hjälpa dem genom deras digitala transformation. Du jobbar långsiktigt i teamleveranser med modernisering, automation och agil utveckling, enligt vår metodik Journey to Agile. Några av de tekniker/metoder som vi arbetar med är Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Jenkins, Ansible, Git, Bash, Python.
  
Vem är du? Vi söker dig som har gedigen erfarenhet inom Plattform/DevOps och som brinner för automatisering och att bygga effektiva lösningar ute hos våra kunder. Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift.
  
För denna position krävs svenskt medborgarskap, vi utför även bakgrundskontroll av slutkandidat.
  
  

**Du bör ha koll på:**  

Linux i enterprise-miljöer
  
  

**Containerteknik:** Docker, Kubernetes
  
  

**Script/programmering:** Bash, Python, Go
  
  

**Versionshantering:** Git
  
  

**Automatisering:** Ansible, Terraform
  
  

CI/CD och GitOps
  
  

**Extra plus om du även har koll på:**  

OpenStack
  
  

Public cloud
  
  

OpenShift/Rancher
  
  

HashiCorp Vault/Consul
  
  

Vi erbjuder dig Som anställd på Accelerate erbjuder vi förutom spännande uppdrag och tekniker:
  
  

Utbildning & certifieringar via våra partners (Red Hat, Microsoft, HashiCorp, GitLab m.fl.)
  
  

En trygg och säker anställning med bra förmåner
  
  

Kollektivavtal, friskvårdsbidrag och sjukvårdsförsäkring
  
  

Flexibilitet, frihet och balans mellan jobb och fritid
  
  

Att bli en del i ett passionerat team med tekniskt vassa kollegor
  
  

Vi tror på gemenskap och kompetensutbyte – här utvecklas vi tillsammans och stöttar varandra för att alltid ligga i framkant.
  
Placeringsort Accelerate finns på flertal orter i Sverige och Norge. För denna tjänst utgår du från vårt kontor i Stockholm, med möjlighet till hybridarbete.
  
Önskad start är snarast eller enligt överenskommelse. Har du frågor? Kontakta Jesper Carlsson på jesper.carlsson@iver.se
  
Vi ser fram emot att träffa dig. Välkommen till Accelerate!

title: SAP EAM Functional Expert – S/4HANA
description:
About the Role
  
We are looking for a highly experienced SAP EAM Functional Expert to join a team driving ongoing and upcoming S/4HANA transformation initiatives. In this role, you will serve as a key subject matter expert within SAP Plant Maintenance, contributing to both implementation and migration activities across complex, multinational environments. You will be the bridge between business requirements and technical delivery, ensuring that solutions are scalable, well-documented, and aligned with S/4HANA best practices.
  
Responsibilities
  
Work with SAP EAM / Plant Maintenance within S/4HANA, supporting implementation and migration from ECC to S/4HANA
  
Translate business requirements into clear and actionable functional specifications
  
Perform fit-gap analyses and recommend best practices aligned with S/4HANA capabilities
  
Configure SAP PM modules to meet business requirements and support custom solution implementations
  
Collaborate with business stakeholders, super users, and IT teams to understand needs, resolve issues, and ensure smooth delivery
  
Manage master data, maintenance processes, and integrations between SAP PM and other SAP modules
  
Support blueprinting, testing, training, documentation, and go-live activities throughout the project lifecycle
  
Ensure stable and efficient integration flows to and from SAP systems
  
  

Requirements
  
Minimum 10 years of experience in SAP PM implementation or support roles
  
Proven experience in S/4HANA implementations and migrations
  
Solid practical experience with SAP Fiori applications
  
Strong understanding of standard processes in SAP PM and S/4HANA
  
Strong knowledge of integration flows to and from SAP, including SAP MM
  
Proficiency in writing blueprints and translating requirements into functional specifications
  
Ability to communicate clearly between business stakeholders and functional/technical teams
  
Fluency in both Swedish and English, written and spoken
  
  

Meriting
  
Basic knowledge of ABAP programming for troubleshooting and understanding custom code
  
Experience working with Microsoft DevOps in SAP projects
  
Experience in agile teams following Scrum methodologies
  
Background in collaborating closely with developers, test teams, and business stakeholders in cross-functional setups
  
  

**Start:** 2026-05 Duration: Until 2026-12 Location: Trollhättan / Stockholm (hybrid)

title: Lead Consultant - Advanced .NET, C#, Azure, React, Power Platform, Office 365, AI
description:
**Job Title: Lead Consultant – Full Stack & Microsoft Technologies**  

**Location:** Sweden  

**Experience:** 10+ years  

**Technologies:** Advanced .NET, C#, Azure, React, Power Platform, Office 365, AI  

  

**Role Overview**  

A highly skilled Lead Engineer with strong expertise across Microsoft technology stack and modern web frameworks. The role involves designing and delivering scalable, secure, and intelligent enterprise applications leveraging .NET, Azure, React, Power Platform, Office 365, and AI capabilities.  

The ideal candidate will work closely with business stakeholders, architects, and cross‑functional teams to deliver high‑impact digital transformation solutions.  

  

**Key Responsibilities**  

**Application Development**  

* Design, develop, and maintain enterprise applications using **C#, .NET Core / .NET 6+**, and **React**
* Build RESTful APIs, microservices, and backend services following clean architecture principles
* Develop responsive, high‑performance front‑end interfaces using **React, TypeScript, HTML, CSS**

**Microsoft Azure**  

* Architect and implement cloud‑native solutions using **Azure App Services, Functions, Logic Apps, Azure SQL, Cosmos DB, Storage Accounts**
* Implement **Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines**, infrastructure as code, and monitoring
* Ensure security, scalability, availability, and cost optimization of Azure solutions

**Power Platform**  

* Design and develop solutions using **Power Apps (Canvas & Model‑Driven)**, **Power Automate**, **Power BI**, and **Dataverse**
* Integrate Power Platform with Azure services, .NET applications, and external APIs
* Establish governance, environment strategy, and ALM best practices

**Office 365 & Integrations**  

* Build solutions integrated with **Microsoft 365**, including **SharePoint Online, Teams, Outlook, OneDrive**
* Customize and extend Office 365 using SPFx, Graph APIs, and Power Platform
* Support automation and collaboration solutions across M365 workloads

**Artificial Intelligence**  

* Incorporate **AI/ML capabilities** such as Azure AI services, Cognitive Services, Copilot, or OpenAI integrations
* Design intelligent workflows for prediction, document processing, chatbots, and decision automation
* Ensure responsible AI usage with focus on security, compliance, and ethical standards

**Leadership & Collaboration**  

* Provide technical leadership, code reviews, and mentoring to junior team members
* Participate in architecture discussions and solution design reviews
* Collaborate with product owners, business analysts, and stakeholders to gather and refine requirements
* Support production systems, troubleshoot issues, and drive continuous improvements

  

  

  

**Required Skills & Experience**  

* 10+ years of hands‑on IT experience
* Strong expertise in C#, .NET Core / .NET Framework
* Proficiency in React.js, modern JavaScript/TypeScript
* Solid experience with Microsoft Azure cloud services
* Hands‑on experience with Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI, Dataverse)
* Strong understanding of Office 365 / Microsoft 365 ecosystem
* Experience integrating AI services into enterprise applications
* Knowledge of REST APIs, microservices, and event‑driven architectures
* Exposure to Agile/Scrum development methodologies
* Excellent problem‑solving, communication, and stakeholder‑management skills

  

  

  

**Nice‑to‑Have Skills**  

* Experience with **Dynamics 365**
* Knowledge of Kubernetes, Docker, or containerized deployments
* Experience with SPFx and Microsoft Graph
* Prior experience in consulting or client‑facing roles

  

  

  

**Qualifications & Certifications**  

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
* Preferred Microsoft Certifications:
  

	+ Azure Developer / Architect
	+ Power Platform Developer or Solution Architect
	+ AI or Data‑related Microsoft certifications

title: Klientspecialist
description:
*Vi tror att framsteg och möjligheter skapas bäst tillsammans. Välkommen till en plats där samarbete gör skillnad.*

Din roll


Vill du arbeta med Klient konfigurering som en central del av Saabs Digital Workplace?


Group IT söker nu en senior klientspecialist som vill bidra till en säker, användarvänlig och effektiv klientplattform för Saab.


I den här rollen blir du en del av vårt team inom Digital Workplace, där vi hanterar klienter och samarbetslösningar som stödjer Saabs globala verksamhet. Du är prestigelös och van att arbeta i team där man delar med sig av kunskap och tar hjälp av varandra.


Tjänsten är placerad på någon av följande verksamhetsorter: Linköping, Stockholm eller Göteborg. Hybrid arbetsplats är möjlig och resor nationellt samt internationellt kan förekomma. Ditt huvudsakliga ansvar kommer vara hantering av klientenheter och dess applikationer.

  

Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer bland annat innefatta att:

* Konfigurera och hantera klientplattformen, så som datorer, och applikationer.
* Felsöka och åtgärda större problem.
* Arbeta i projekt.
* Säkerställa en stabil och säker drift av plattformen.
* Automatisering.


Din profil


För att lyckas i rollen ser vi gärna att du har:

* Senior erfarenhet kring olika klientplattformar.
* Gedigen erfarenhet inom workspace området.
* Social och kommunikativ förmåga.
* Arbetat i komplexa miljöer där kravuppfyllnad och säkerhet kommer först.
* Är proaktiv och lösningsorienterad som person.


Önskvärda färdigheter och erfarenheter:

* En eller flera Microsoft, Google eller AWS-certifieringar.
* Erfarenhet inom DevOps/tvärfunktionella team.
* Erfarenhet av olika klientmanageringsverktyg
* Erfarenhet av regulatoriska krav eller säkerhetskrav.

*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*


Vad du blir en del av


Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.


Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26,100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.


Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här
