Leadership & Collaboration
  
Provide technical leadership, code reviews, and mentoring to junior team members
  
Participate in architecture discussions and solution design reviews
  
Collaborate with product owners, business analysts, and stakeholders to gather and refine requirements
  
Support production systems, troubleshoot issues, and drive continuous improvements
  
  

Required Skills & Experience
  
10+ years of hands‑on IT experience
  
Strong expertise in C#, .NET Core / .NET Framework
  
Proficiency in React.js, modern JavaScript/TypeScript
  
Solid experience with Microsoft Azure cloud services
  
Hands‑on experience with Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI, Dataverse)
  
Strong understanding of Office 365 / Microsoft 365 ecosystem
  
Experience integrating AI services into enterprise applications
  
Knowledge of REST APIs, microservices, and event‑driven architectures
  
Exposure to Agile/Scrum development methodologies
  
Excellent problem‑solving, communication, and stakeholder‑management skills
  
  

Nice‑to‑Have Skills
  
Experience with Dynamics 365
  
Knowledge of Kubernetes, Docker, or containerized deployments
  
Experience with SPFx and Microsoft Graph
  
Prior experience in consulting or client‑facing roles
  
  

Qualifications & Certifications
  
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
  
  

**Preferred Microsoft Certifications:**  

Azure Developer / Architect
  
Power Platform Developer or Solution Architect
  
AI or Data‑related Microsoft certifications
company_description: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 59 countries to navigate their digital transformation.

title: System Solution Specialist
description:
Would you like to create customer communication outputs?


We in Application Platforms are a unit responsible for business-critical IT infrastructure and application platforms in If Nordics. We take care of vital IT services, such as data platforms and document management.


Insurance is all about life. And it’s all about IT. In our team you’ll work with technical solutions that have the power to turn misfortunes into possibilities and dreams into reality. We use interesting technology to create frontrunning insurance experiences for our customers. Giving them the security and the confidence to be curious, explore new worlds, start new businesses and live their lives.


**About the role**
------------------

As a Document Management System Solution Specialist, you will be part of the Application Platforms unit and Document Management Platform team. Our Document Management system holds over 500 million documents that must be highly available and maintained according to various business rules and regulations.


In this role, you will have a direct impact on the customer experience by developing and maintaining our Document Composition customer communication solutions and outputs within business ‑ critical insurance systems. You will design and implement a wide range of document templates and customer communication outputs used across the business, ensuring consistent and high ‑ quality communication across multiple channels.


You will also work with key customer communication solutions by contributing to the creation and maintenance of composition environments. Your work includes testing and quality ‑ assuring customer communication outputs and related solutions, as well as continuously enhancing and optimizing existing ones.


In addition, you will support our internal stakeholders in their daily work by helping them learn, troubleshoot, and improve communication solutions. You will participate in production support and operational activities, such as handling incidents, managing problems, and securing business continuity.


We value continuous learning and development, and we support your growth. Your initiative, curiosity, and willingness to develop new competencies will be encouraged and recognized as part of our commitment to staying at the forefront of the field.


**We offer**
------------

Here are some of the benefits of working at If:


* An including work environment where everyone is welcome
* Career and development opportunities in the biggest insurance company in the Nordics
* Social activities, as well as highly skilled professional environment
* Possibility of hybrid workplace
* Health promoting workplace with e.g., wellness allowance and various sports activities
* Great insurance benefits
**About the team**
------------------

With us, you get the opportunity to join a team of enthusiastic people with a solid dedication to their work - t ruly putting their hearts into it. We foster an open, trusting culture where respect and appreciation guide our communication. As we work with technology and people, we have a strong appetite for learning new and genuine curiosity towards new ideas , different opinions and approaches. We are autonomous and self-driven people, and we value autonomy, collaboration, and a good sense of humour. Together, we celebrate success and support each other.


**Who are you?**
----------------

Because our document management solutions are vital for business continuity , and the communication outputs you create directly shape our customer experience , you have a strong sense of responsibility and risk awareness. You understand the importance of clear, accurate , and well ‑ designed communication in building trust and delivering a high ‑ quality experience to our customers.


You thrive in an agile team environment and appreciate the routines and collaboration that come with it. You are a true team player with a natural curiosity and a desire to learn, grow, and take on new challenges. You value knowledge sharing, both giving and receiving support to help the team succeed.


You enjoy solving problems, approaching situations from multiple perspectives, and turning challenges into solutions.


You also have:


* Experience in Document Composition products, such as Metaforce Metatool or equivalent
* Strong skills in JScript and JavaScript, with the ability to learn new tools and technologies quickly
* A good understanding of document composition systems and how they support customer communication
* Knowledge of testing and quality assurance practices
* Experience in production support and operational activities
* An analytical, thorough, and solutions-oriented working approach
* Strong collaboration and communication skills
* Experience working with Agile methods and tools such as Azure DevOps
* A good/excellent level of English, enabling clear collaboration with colleagues and stakeholders across countries
It is seen as an advantage if you also have:


* Experience working with insurance or financial services systems
* Skills in .NET development
* Fluency in the local language
**Additional** **facts and the recruitment process**
----------------------------------------------------

**Application deadline:** Screening and interviewing will start immediately . However, application deadline is 26 th of May 2026.


**To apply for the position:** Please attach your CV and answer the questions in the application form.


**Work location:** This role is open in all major offices in the Nordic countries.


**Start:** As soon as possible/By agreement  



For more information, please contact Lasse Saine, Manager - Document Management Platform, lasse.saine@if.fi .  



*Background checks will be done* *in accordance with* *the law in the country of employment.*

We look forward to your application!

title: Kravanalytiker
description:
**Uppdragsbeskrivning**


Vi söker en Kravanalytiker.

**Ska-krav:**

* Du har minst åtta (8) års erfarenhet inhämtad under de senaste femton (15) åren i rollen som kravanalytiker eller kravhanterare där det ingått genomföra analysarbete, att samla in behov och omsätta dessa till funktionella och icke-funktionella krav samt visualisering av krav.
* Du har minst åtta (8) års erfarenhet inhämtad under de senaste femton (15) åren av att arbeta teambaserat med agila metoder.
* Du har minst fem (5) års erfarenhet inhämtad under de senaste tio (10) åren av att arbeta med krav i ärendehanteringssystem som Azure DevOps, TFS, Jira eller liknande.
* Du har goda kunskaper i svenska i såväl tal som skrift.
* Uppdraget omfattas av säkerhetsskyddsavtal (nivå 2) och kräver godkänd säkerhetsprövning.


Bör-krav:

* Du har minst tre (3) års erfarenhet inhämtad under de senaste tio (10) åren av att ha arbetet i rollen som kravanalytiker med informations- och processkartläggning.
* Du har minst tre (3) års erfarenhet inhämtad under de senaste tio (10) åren av att ha arbetet i rollen som kravanalytiker i uppdrag kopplat till upphandling och införande av inköpta system.
* Du har minst tre (3) års erfarenhet inhämtad under de senaste tio (10) åren av att ha arbetet i rollen som kravanalytiker i uppdrag med hög säkerhetsklass (information klassad K4 eller högre) hos en myndighet.

title: Senior Kravledare
description:
### **Uppdragsbeskrivning**


Vi söker nu en senior och strategisk kravledare till ett uppdrag just nu. Konsulten kommer att driva och samordna kravarbete i komplexa verksamhets- och IT-initiativ med många intressenter och höga krav på struktur, kommunikation och governance.


Rollen innebär ansvar för att leda kravprocessen från behovsanalys till verifierade krav samt säkerställa att verksamhetsmål omsätts till tydliga och genomförbara lösningar.

**Ansvarsområden**
------------------

* Leda och koordinera kravarbete i större program och projekt
* Ansvara för kravstrategi, kravprocess och metodik
* Driva workshops och behovsanalyser med verksamhet och IT
* Identifiera, dokumentera och prioritera verksamhetskrav och systemkrav
* Säkerställa spårbarhet mellan affärsbehov, krav och lösning
* Samordna krav mellan flera intressenter och leverantörer
* Stötta projektledning, arkitekter och utvecklingsteam i kravrelaterade frågor
* Hantera förändringar och kravstyrning genom hela projektlivscykeln
* Bidra till förbättring av arbetssätt, governance och processer inom kravhantering


Säkerställa att lösningar uppfyller regulatoriska och verksamhetsmässiga krav

**Kravprofil**
--------------

### **Obligatoriska krav**

* Minst 8–10 års erfarenhet av kravanalys och kravledning
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av strategisk kravledning i komplexa organisationer
* Erfarenhet från större offentlig verksamhet eller samhällskritisk verksamhet
* God erfarenhet av att leda workshops och facilitera beslutsforum
* Erfarenhet av både verksamhetsnära och tekniska krav
* Erfarenhet av agila och traditionella projektmodeller
* Förmåga att omsätta verksamhetsbehov till tydliga kravspecifikationer
* Mycket god kommunikativ och pedagogisk förmåga
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift

### **Meriterande**

* Erfarenhet från kollektivtrafik, transport eller offentlig sektor
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom stora digitaliserings- eller transformationsprogram
* Certifiering inom exempelvis IREB, BABOK, SAFe eller liknande
* Erfarenhet av kravverktyg som Jira, Azure DevOps eller Enterprise Architect
* Erfarenhet av integrations- och informationsflöden
* Erfarenhet av governance och portföljstyrning

**Personliga egenskaper**
-------------------------

* Strategisk och analytisk
* Strukturerad och metodisk
* Stark stakeholder management-förmåga
* Självständig och drivande
* God samarbetsförmåga
* Prestigelös och kommunikativ
* Van att navigera i komplexa organisationer

**Övrigt**
----------

* Du bör kunna arbeta både operativt och strategiskt
* Uppdraget kan innebära arbete i säkerhetsklassad miljö
* Referensuppdrag inom liknande miljöer kan komma att efterfrågas

**Om Infinity IT Consulting**  

Infinity IT Consulting är ett konsultbolag inom IT, management och HR, med stark teamkänsla och en kultur där medarbetarnas välmående står i centrum. Vi samarbetar med kunder och partners över hela Skandinavien inom bland annat telekom, industri, offentlig sektor, retail samt sport och mode. Vår verksamhet bygger på värderingarna pannben, enkelhet, laganda, långsiktighet och stolthet – något som genomsyrar både vårt arbete och vårt sätt att vara mot varandra. Hos oss finns en mix av juniora och seniora konsulter där erfarenhet delas, kompetens utvecklas och alla får möjlighet att växa i sin IT-karriär.

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
Flightradar24 is one of the most successful growth-stage tech companies in Stockholm. Each month more than 50 million aviation enthusiasts visit Flightradar24 (app/website) and our Commercial services team has many of the biggest names in aviation on its customer list.


We are looking for a Senior Platform Engineer with Data Engineering skills, who can quickly understand existing systems, work independently, and deliver value from day one. You will play a key role in evolving and improving our data platform, working closely with other engineers and stakeholders. You will be part of a data engineering team responsible for designing, building, and operating scalable data solutions in AWS. The work includes both hands-on development and architectural decision-making.


The position requires that you are able to work from our office in Stockholm, Sweden. Relocation is not offered for this role.

**What you’ll do**
------------------


Your responsibilities include:

* Building and maintaining backend services for high-volume data processing and APIs
* Designing and improving data ingestion, streaming, and event processing (batch and real-time)
* Refactoring and enhancing existing services, pipelines, and infrastructure
* Implementing robust data collection, transformation, and storage solutions
* Operating and improving cloud-based platforms (primarily AWS)
* Improving observability, reliability, and operational tooling for production systems
* Contributing to best practices around CI/CD, testing, code quality, and documentation
* Collaborating with software engineers, data engineers, and analysts to deliver reliable data products

**Current tech stack**
----------------------

* Backend services: C++ and Python
* Cloud & Data Platform: AWS (S3, Glue/Spark, Airflow/MWAA, Athena, MSK/Kafka, Lambda)
* Streaming & Messaging: Kafka (or similar), RabbitMQ
* Databases & Storage: SQL/NoSQL systems (e.g., MySQL/MariaDB/Postgres, Redis, DynamoDB, data lake/warehouse patterns)
* DevOps & Platform: Docker, Kubernetes/EKS, Terraform
* Engineering practices: Infrastructure as Code, CI/CD, linting, unit tests,  

integration tests

**About you**
-------------

* Has several years of hands-on experience building and operating production systems
* Strong experience with software development in C++, Python, Go, Rust, (or similar)
* Strong experience designing and operating production backend systems
* Experience with data engineering architectures for ingestion and transformation
* Experience working with cloud-based platforms, preferably AWS
* Solid understanding of databases (warehouses, OLTP/OLAP concepts, query performance)
* Experience with event-driven or streaming architectures (Kafka or similar)
* Strong understanding of reliability, observability, and production operations


We also see that you…

* Are self-driven and comfortable making technical decisions independently
* Can quickly understand and work within an existing codebase and architecture
* Value clean code, testing, automation, and pragmatic engineering practices
* Communicate clearly and professionally in English


Bonus points

* Experience with Machine Learning concepts and data platforms supporting ML workloads
* Experience working with high-volume real-time telemetry or tracking data
* Domain knowledge in aviation data standards (e.g., ADS-B) or similar

**About Flightradar24**
-----------------------


With over 6 million daily users, Flightradar24 is the world’s most popular flight tracking service. Our app regularly tops the App Store and Google Play Travel charts. We also offer a wide range of commercial services and our customers include many of the biggest names in aviation.

  

We're constantly adding new services and improving existing products. To help us meet those challenges, we're looking for creative, collaborative and tech-savvy applicants to join us.  

  



Benefits of working at Flightradar24 include:

* Opportunity to impact a service with millions of end users from all around the world
* Flexible and social work environment with free beverages, fruit, and snacks
* Modern office in the heart of beautiful downtown Stockholm, Sweden
* Being part of a diverse team with +30 nationalities and 6 continents represented with English being our main language

title: DevOps/Infra Engineer
description:
#### **Why choose Coody**


At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:

**Maximized Compensation.** Typically a +40% salary increase.

**Freedom & Flexibility**. No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.

**Employment Security.** High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.

**Shape the Future.** Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*

 **What you’ll be doing**


As a Senior DevOps/Infra Engineer at Coody, you’ll have the opportunity to work with some of the most inspiring digital entertainment companies in the world, in fields such as Gaming, AR/VR, Music, and other forms of interactive media. You’ll collaborate with cross-functional teams, including developers, designers, artists, producers, and product managers.


You’ll need to be adaptable and ready to hit the ground running in new environments. We see every challenge as an opportunity to grow. Typically, you’ll work on 1-2 assignments per year for companies in industries that you’re passionate about.

##### **Who you are**


We’re looking for talented engineers who loves to build immersive experiences and bring ideas to life. You thrive in fast-paced environments, enjoy pushing technical boundaries, and want the freedom to work on exciting projects - without the corporate nonsense.

* **5+ years of experience in software development or DevOps/Infrastructure engineering.**
* Experience from modernization and migration of the entire CI/CD infrastructure
* Proven experience designing, building, and optimizing CI/CD pipelines for C#
* Strong skills using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform and Ansible
* A relevant degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Game Development, or similar
* **Based in Sweden** - You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, or permanent residency
* Be able to work from the clients office in central Stockholm about 3 days per week
* Fluent in English (spoken and written)

#### **This is Coody**


We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting,combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.


At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.


Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.


We’re a **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals**, representing more than **14 nationalities**.

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy**. Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice, **explore our Employee Handbook** and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.

##### **How to apply**


Excited to take the next step in your career and work on meaningful client assignments? Apply now, and we’ll be in touch shortly.

title: Platform engineer
description:
At Avanti, we operate at the intersection of advanced technology and high-end interactive entertainment. Our mission is to redefine digital engagement by blurring the lines between the virtual and the physical, creating next-generation live experiences powered by hyper-realistic characters and real-time interaction. We exist to challenge industry standards, injecting technical brilliance into systems that demand absolute stability and global scalability.


We are transforming the landscape of digital participation by combining the high-fidelity aesthetics of AAA gaming with the complex logic of scalable cloud systems. Our goal is a future where passive viewing is replaced by active, seamless participation. To support the heart of our expanding technology stack, we are looking for a skilled Platform Engineer.

### **The Opportunity – What You Will Build**


As a Platform Engineer at Avanti, you have a unique opportunity to design and build the very heart of our infrastructure. You will be responsible for creating and maintaining the environments that power our software products, with a focus on world-class stability and high-performance execution.


You will join a specialized team exploring how to best run Unreal Engine in the cloud to enable massive live experiences. This is a role where your technical decisions directly shape our architecture and tool selection. You will have the freedom to influence how we automate and scale our global footprint.


In this role, AI-driven development is a natural part of your daily workflow. You will build a platform that doesn't just support our developers, but directly enables faster time-to-market and a superior experience for our global audience.

### **Main Responsibilities**

* **Design and maintain** the company's cloud infrastructure in GCP to ensure 24/7 uptime and high performance.
* **Build and automate** robust CI/CD pipelines to support a seamless software development lifecycle.
* **Ensure system stability** through proactive troubleshooting and managing the platform's uptime for live operations.
* **Implement and manage** container solutions using Kubernetes to enable rapid scalability based on real-time demand.
* **Provide technical support** to internal development teams, acting as the vital bridge between software and infrastructure.
* **Integrate and develop** AI-driven tools and workflows to optimize the platform and development processes.

### **Who We Are Looking For**


We are looking for a problem-solver who finds beauty in logic and thrives on technical precision. You are someone who understands that in a live environment, stability is just as important as innovation. You likely have a passion for complex systems and enjoy the challenge of building infrastructure that is both highly secure and capable of scaling with zero margin for error.


Your mindset is proactive and detail-oriented; you don’t wait for instructions but identify bottlenecks and take the initiative to fix them. You are a communicative team player who enjoys sharing technical insights with a team of like-minded specialists, ensuring that everyone is aligned toward the common goal.

### **Qualifications**

* **Proven DevOps Experience:** Strong background in software/server-side development or infrastructure management.
* **Cloud Platforms:** Proficiency in Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* **Orchestration:** Solid experience working with Kubernetes.
* **Coding Skills:** Proficiency in Golang, Proto, terraform or Python.
* **CI/CD Mastery:** Experience in building and performing large-scale automation and data validation via pipelines.
* **Language:** Professional fluency in English.

### **It is a Plus if You Have**

* Interest with AI infrastructure and hardware acceleration (e.g., NVIDIA).
* Knowledge of global video distribution or real-time streaming protocols.
* Background in iGaming or live-regulated interactive systems.
* Experience with server security and data integrity in "validation-heavy" environments.

### **Who We Are**


Avanti is an innovative technology company dedicated to creating the next generation of live interactive experiences. By combining technical excellence with creative height, we have established ourselves as a respected partner for global clients who demand world-class stability and immersion. We are currently in a strong growth phase, driven by an entrepreneurial spirit and a commitment to quality in every detail.

### **What We Offer**

* **Cutting-edge Tech:** Work with the latest in GCP, Kubernetes, and Unreal-hosting in the cloud.
* **AI-Enhanced Environment:** We actively use tools like Claude and Gemini to augment our creation and problem-solving.
* **A Key Role:** You join a tight-knit team where your work defines the product core and tech-stack.
* **Development:** Opportunities for personal growth and technical specialization in a fast-paced environment.
* **Modern Work Culture:** A collaborative, prestige-less environment with a central Stockholm office and a hybrid-flexible approach.

**Department & Location** Platform Team – Stockholm (Central office, hybrid-flexible).

**Application** Selection is ongoing. We look forward to receiving your application. Read more about us at **avanti.live**

title: AgentOps & Cloud Engineer
description:
**The Role** 




 Are you passionate about making AI agents run smoothly, securely, and efficiently in production? At Algorithma, an AI services company based in Stockholm and Gothenburg, we are looking for an AgentOps & Cloud Engineer to join our team. In this role, you will ensure our AI systems operate reliably, integrating cutting-edge cloud infrastructure, observability, and automation to support our agent lifecycle.
 



  





 You'll work at the intersection of AI orchestration, cloud infrastructure, and operational tooling, playing a critical role in deploying, monitoring, and optimizing LLM-based agents. Your work will directly impact the reliability, scalability, and performance of our AI solutions, enabling our clients to leverage the full potential of intelligent automation.
 



  





**What You Bring** 



* Cloud & infrastructure expertise: 3–5 years of experience building, maintaining, and optimizing cloud infrastructure to support AI agents, APIs, and workflows.
* Operational excellence: Hands-on experience deploying, monitoring, and operating LLM-based agents and orchestration workflows in production environments.
* CI/CD & automation: Ability to design and implement CI/CD pipelines for agents, tools, and supporting components, ensuring seamless and efficient deployments.
* Observability & reliability: Skills in implementing monitoring, logging, alerting, and diagnostics to maintain agent health and system performance.
* Problem-solving: Experience in incident resolution, debugging, and driving operational improvements to enhance system reliability.
* Security & compliance: Knowledge of IAM, policies, and guardrails to ensure secure and compliant operations.
* Collaboration: Strong ability to work with AI Engineers, Delivery Leads, and Architects to create scalable, cost-efficient cloud solutions.
* Language skills: Fluency in English is required; Swedish is a plus.
* Location: This role is based in our Stockholm office and requires on-site work.



  





**Bonus Points** 



* Experience with retrieval systems, vector stores, or operational tooling for AI agents.



  





**What We Offer** 



* Impact: Play a key role in ensuring high reliability and performance of AI agents that power real-world applications.
* Innovation: Work with the latest technologies in AI orchestration, cloud infrastructure, and operational tooling.
* Growth: Opportunities to develop your skills in a dynamic environment that values continuous learning and collaboration.
* Culture: Join a team committed to positive impact, innovation, and delivering exceptional AI services.
* Benefits: Competitive salary, comprehensive benefits, and the chance to shape the future of AI operations.

title: Senior Cloud Data Engineer | SEB, Solna
description:
*SEB is a leading northern European financial services group, and at the same time, one of the largest IT employers in the Nordics. Banking is changing rapidly, and we are proud of our reputation of being entrepreneurial and innovative in the face of change.*
 Are you a cloud data engineer who wants to create value through data and innovation and is motivated by delivering customer value with high quality? Do you also have a proactive attitude when it comes to continuous improvements and investigating new technologies and concepts, while having experience of Financial Products? If so, this is probably a position for you! We are now looking for a Cloud Data Engineer to our Regulatory team within Trading Technology.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
 As a cloud data engineer, you will work with Regulatory and business-related development in our high-priority trading area. You will help develop our cloud-based data warehouse to further support our trading business. You will belong to our cross-functional team in which you will work with requirements, test, development, and deployment as well as having a dialogue with stakeholders around the solutions. In addition, you will also collaborate with other developers in the team through coaching, performing code reviews, and being involved in design decisions, etc.
   

  

**Who We Are Looking For**
 You are a confident and skilled developer with strong technical expertise and a genuine interest in the Trading area, motivated by creating highvalue, businessdriven solutions.
   

  

 You are also a self‑motivated individual who demonstrates respect for others, takes an active interest in collaboration, and contributes positively as a team player with an open mindset.
   

  

**You are also proficient in:**
* Data engineer with minimum 3 years of experience in the field
* Data integration, data modelling and data pipelines in the cloud
* SQL and programming skills (preferably Python)
* Version Control (i.e., Git) and Agile development
* Testing and test-automation


**Highly meriting is also:**
* Google Cloud Platform (other cloud providers)
* BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Run, PubSub and Cloud Storage
* Dataform /dbt
* Airflow
* Terraform
* Monitoring and alerting of Data Warehouse
* Data management/data mesh
* Other cloud providers
* GCP Cloud Data Engineer Certified (or equivalent)


**Your team** 
  

  

 You will join our Regulatory team of 12 highly collaborative members, where everyone contributes across the full development lifecycle. We pride ourselves on a strong team culture built on openness, trust, and active knowledge sharing. We work in an agile setup following SEB’s implementation of SAFe, with daily stand-ups, regular reviews, and retrospectives that support continuous improvement.
   

  

 The team is responsible for two applications, both under active and continuous development.
   

  

 We strongly encourage professional growth and see GCP certifications at various levels as a natural and valued part of your development journey. We also encourage active and responsible use of Copilot and LLMs to support development and enhance productivity.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* The chance to develop a new data warehouse on the Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
* A varying position where you will be part of building our new platform as well as take end to end responsibility of the Regulatory use cases
* A highly regarded team of experienced colleagues who value collaboration and openness
* Opportunity to share knowledge by pair- and mob-programming, demos and more
* A modern office with restaurants and gym next to Mall of Scandinavia in Solna
* A workplace where we care about the work-life balance
* An innovative company in forefront of technology


**Ready to join?**
 Since we review applications and select potential candidates on a continuous basis, you are welcome to send your application as soon as possible, but no later than
 **31st of May 2026** 
 . For questions regarding the position or the recruitment process, please contact Ali Rezai at ali.rezai@seb.se

title: DevOps Engineer till agilt team
description:
Vi söker en driven och lösningsorienterad DevOps Engineer som vill vara en viktig del i arbetet med att förvalta och vidareutveckla våra system. Här får du kombinera tekniskt djup med samarbete och innovation i en agil organisation där kvalitet, säkerhet och automation står i centrum.
   

  

 Som DevOps Engineer hos oss blir du en del av ett kompetent team som ansvarar för våra system i produktionsmiljö, samt test- och utvecklingsmiljöer och våra CI/CD-pipelines.
   

  

 Om jobbet
   

  

 Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:
   

  

* Stötta utvecklingsteam med förändringar och avhjälpa hinder
* Felsöka problem i produktions- och testmiljöer
* Driva förbättringar, migreringar och integrationer
* Utveckla och optimera CI/CD-pipelines
* Automatisera processer och flöden
* Underhålla test- och utvecklingsmiljöer
* Samarbeta med kollegor för att säkerställa att infrastruktur och säkerhet möter verksamhetens behov
* Drift och underhåll av de system som teamet ansvarar för
* Incidenthantering


 Du blir en del av ett agilt utvecklingsteam, tillsammans med andra systemutvecklare och testare, en Scrum Master och en Product Owner.
   

  

 Vi arbetar enligt SAFe-ramverket och samarbetar nära andra team och tåg inom utveckling och drift.
   

  

 Du kommer även att ingå i en kompetensgrupp inom DevOps och applikationsdrift, där erfarenhetsutbyte, förbättringsarbete och kunskapsdelning står i fokus.
   

  

 Du kommer också ingå i tågets kompetensgrupp av DevOps Engineers. Teamledaren skriver "Genom veckovisa avstämningar, gemensam dokumentation och samarbete över flera team säkerställer vi kompetens oavsett vem som är på plats"
   

  

 Johanna Rastas Kalkbrenner heter jag som kommer bli din chef och jag har bakgrund inom process-, arbetssätts-, och tjänsteutveckling. Jag ansvarar för en grupp av DevOps Engineers på Pensionsmyndigheten.
   

  

 Som DevOps Engineer följs du upp på hur du:
   

  

* Tar ansvar: Du har ett helhetsansvar för de system och miljöer teamet hanterar och flaggar för hinder, utmaningar eller säkerhetsrisker. Du tar också ansvar för din egna kompetensutveckling.
* Möjliggör förändring: Du stöttar kollegor i förändringar och bidrar till smidiga processer – även när prioriteringar snabbt kan skifta.
* Driver utveckling: Du vågar tänka nytt, föreslå förbättringar och testa idéer inom givna ramar.


 Din profil
   

  

 Vi söker dig som trivs i en roll där teknik, samarbete och problemlösning möts. Du är kommunikativ, ansvarstagande och har en naturlig förmåga att skapa struktur och driva arbetet framåt.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* Flerårig arbetserfarenhet av Linux systemadministration (gärna Red Hat Enterprise Linux)
* Flerårig arbetserfarenhet av Containerteknik (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Flerårig arbetserfarenhet av inom programmering, gärna skriptprogrammering bash/Python eller Java
* Flerårig arbetserfarenhet av att jobba med relationsdatabaser (som användare, queries, indexering, enklare modellering)
* Flerårig arbetserfarenhet av versionshantering, tex GIT
* Erfarenhet av Configuration as Code
* Erfarenhet av verktyg för CI/CD
* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift


 Det är meriterande om du har:
   

  

* Flerårig arbetserfarenhet av roller där arbetssätt har varit agilt/lean och DevOps
* Erfarenhet av att leda förändringar inom DevOps
* Arbetserfarenhet av Elastic Stack / Grafana / Prometheus / APM
* Arbetserfarenhet av Nagios / check\_mk och monitorering
* Erfarenhet av Puppet
* Erfarenhet av Jenkins
* Erfarenhet av Rancher
* Certifikat och PKI-strukturer


 Vi erbjuder
   

  

 Ett myndighetsuppdrag som är viktigt på riktigt! En arbetsplats där vi värnar om att våra medarbetare ska ha en god balans mellan arbete och fritid. Vi erbjuder flexibel arbetstid och möjlighet att jobba delvis hemifrån. Som statligt anställd har du även goda anställningsvillkor och ett förmånspaket med friskvård, lediga klämdagar samt goda semester- och pensionsvillkor.
   

  

 Du kan läsa mer om våra förmåner och hur det är att jobba hos oss här.
   

  

 Bra att veta
   

  

 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid och vi tillämpar 6 månaders provanställning. Placeringsort för tjänsten är Stockholm eller Luleå.
   

  

 Anställningen kan komma att placeras i säkerhetsklass.
   

  

 Din ansökan
   

  

 Vi jobbar kompetensbaserat i hela processen och är måna om en inkluderande, rättvis, objektiv och kandidatvänlig process. Därför ber vi dig att besvara ett antal urvalsfrågor istället för att be om personligt brev.
   

  

 Vi kan komma att använda oss av arbetspsykologiska tester.
   

  

 Har du skyddade personuppgifter kontakta rekryterande chef som hjälper dig med din ansökan.
   

  

 Vi strävar efter en jämn könsfördelning och ser mångfald som en styrka och välkomnar därför sökande med olika bakgrund.
   

  

 Inför rekryteringsarbetet har vi tagit ställning till annonskanaler och marknadsföring. Vi undanber oss därför ytterligare kontakt med media-/annonsförsäljare, rekryteringssajter och liknande.
   

  

 Pensionsmyndigheten ansvarar för den allmänna pensionen och informerar om hela pensionen. Varje år betalar vi ut cirka 415 miljarder kronor till 2,3 miljoner pensionärer, genomför cirka 911 000 fondbyten och skickar ut 8 miljoner orange kuvert. Vi har ca 25 miljoner digitala kundkontakter per år. Vi är cirka 1700 medarbetare på åtta orter, från Luleå i norr till Halmstad i söder.
   

  

 Vi gör pensionen enklare.
   

  

 FILM:
   

  

 Anställningsform: tillsvidare med provanställning | Anställningens omfattning: heltid | Antal lediga befattningar: 1 | Sysselsättningsgrad: 100 % | Ort: Stockholm | Län: Stockholms län | Land: Sweden | Referensnummer: PSL 2026-67 | Kontakt: Johan Selenius 072-2102374, Johanna Rastas Kalkbrenner 010-4542039, | Facklig företrädare: Michael Karlsson, ST 010-4543427, Anna-Karin Åhrman Cortelius, Saco-s 010-4543914, | Publicerat: 2026-04-23 | Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-05-17

title: Lead Technical Engineer – Event Integrations
description:
**Job Description**

 We are looking for a
 **Lead Technical Engineer** 
 to join our Event Platform team and help shape how event-driven integrations are designed and governed across H&M.
   

  





 In this senior role, you will take a leading position in defining integration standards, patterns, and best practices for event-driven architecture. You will work closely with teams across the organization to design and implement integrations, support complex initiatives, and ensure event-based solutions are scalable, secure, and aligned with enterprise architecture principles.
   

  





 This role combines
 **technical governance, solution design, and hands-on engineering** 
 , helping teams successfully build integrations while driving improvements to our event platforms.
   

  





  

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

**WHAT YOU'LL DO**



* Define and evolve
 **integration standards, patterns, and governance** 
 for event-driven integrations.
* Provide
 **integration advisory and solution design support** 
 to teams and initiatives across the organization.
* Work directly with teams to
 **design and set up event-based integrations** 
 based on business and technical requirements.
* **Drive improvements** 
 in how event-based integrations are implemented and used across the organization.
* **Evaluate new capabilities** 
 , influence platform evolution, and lead proof-of-concepts where needed.
* Collaborate with architects, developers, and product teams to ensure high-quality integration solutions.



  

  





 Core Competencies
   

  




* Strong understanding of
 **event-driven architecture and integration patterns.**
* Hands-on experience with
 **event platforms such as Apache Kafka or Solace PubSub+.**
* Ability to
 **define and drive integration standards, governance, and best practices.**
* Experience designing
 **scalable and reliable integration solutions.**
* Experience of
 **technical leadership** 
 , guiding and mentoring development teams.
* Ability to
 **review architectural decisions and support teams in building high-quality integrations.**
* Experience working with
 **cloud-based platforms** 
 , preferably
 **Azure** 
 .
* A proactive, collaborative mindset with strong communication and leadership skills.



  

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

***Please note***
 : As our culture and teamwork are very important to us, four days (80%) per week of in-office presence in our office are required.
   

  





 This is a full-time position with placement in
 **Stockholm** 
 .
   

  





  

  





**WHO WE ARE:**
  

 Shaping the future of fashion with people, data, and tech. The fashion and retail industries are going through a transformation, driven by customers' technology and sustainability expectations. At H&M Group, we want to shape the future of fashion and lifestyle by harnessing the power of smart tech and data. With our 74-year history of innovation, we understand the need to collaborate and co-create with engineers and tech specialists around the world to achieve our vision.
   

  





  

  





**WHAT WE OFFER!** 
  

  

 You are joining a unique value-driven culture, a large tech network and community where you can be yourself. Besides the obvious perks such as staff discount card, flexible work life, learning communities, wellness benefits, parental benefits etc. There are endless opportunities to experiment and grow in any direction that you want, and when you grow, we grow. Being a major player gives us countless opportunities to make a real impact and shape the future.

title: DevOps Engineer – Azure, IaC & Containerplattform
description:
Vill du vara med och bygga framtidens plattform i en organisation som står inför en omfattande modernisering av sin infrastruktur?
 



  





 Vi söker en DevOps Engineer med stark utvecklarbakgrund som vill spela en nyckelroll i vår resa mot en mer skalbar, moln- och containerbaserad plattform. Du arbetar inte bara med implementation – du är med och påverkar arkitektur, design och hur vi bygger nästa generations säkra plattform i Azure.
 



  





 Vi står inför en större transformation där vi migrerar från on-prem till molnet samtidigt som vi etablerar en modern containerplattform. Som en del av detta arbetar vi med att vidareutveckla en Azure Enterprise-arkitektur baserad på landing zones i en hub-and-spoke-struktur, med fokus på säkerhet, skalbarhet och governance från grunden.
 



  





 Hos oss får du arbeta i en teknikdriven miljö tillsammans med kompetenta kollegor och tvärfunktionella team, med goda möjligheter att påverka tekniska val och vidareutvecklas.
 



  





**Det här gör du som DevOps Engineer på Folksam** 




 Du arbetar i skärningspunkten mellan utveckling, infrastruktur och arkitektur, där du bidrar till hur våra applikationer ska byggas, deployas och köras i en skalbar och säkerplattform.
 



  





 Du kommer att:
 


* Vara med och utveckla målarkitekturen för vår Azureplattform, med fokus på containerbaserade lösningar
* Bygga och förvalta infrastrukturlösningar med Infrastructure as Code (Bicep)
* Etablera och utveckla robusta GitOps-flöden i Azure DevOps och Argo CD
* Arbeta med hur applikationer paketeras, deployas och körs i Kubernetes/OpenShift
* Fungera som teknisk partner till utvecklingsteam och bidra till en modern DevSecOps- och plattformskultur



  





 Rollen innebär arbete med system med höga krav på stabilitet, säkerhet och regelefterlevnad i en reglerad verksamhet.
 



  





**Är du den vi söker?** 




 Du är en utvecklare i grunden som gillar att lyfta blicken och se helheten. Du trivs i en roll där du får kombinera kod, teknik och arkitektur och där du är med och skapar förutsättningar för andra team att lyckas.
 



  





 Du är nyfiken, drivande och tar ansvar, samtidigt som du gillar att samarbeta och dela med dig av dina erfarenheter.
 



  





 Du har:
 


* En bakgrund som utvecklare (gärna .NET) och är bekväm med att läsa och skriva kod
* Erfarenhet av Azure och molnbaserade lösningar
* God kunskap i IaC, exempelvis Bicep eller Terraform
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD-flöden i Azure DevOps
* Erfarenhet av containerplattformar (Kubernetes/OpenShift)
* Förmåga och intresse att bidra i arkitektur- och designfrågor, inte bara implementation



  





 Det är meriterande om du också har
 


* Erfarenhet av containerisering av applikationer
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetsarbete i molnmiljöer
* Erfarenhet av arbete i större enterprisemiljöer med komplex infrastruktur



  





 Du är en nyfiken och drivande person som gillar att ta ansvar, samarbeta och bidra med nya idéer. Du trivs i en miljö där mycket händer, där du får stort inflytande över tekniska val och möjlighet att påverka hur vi bygger nästa generations plattform.
 



  





**Här kan du göra skillnad** 




 Välkommen till Folksam – här driver du viktiga frågor framåt. Från de avgörande detaljerna till de stora perspektiven, med fokus på att förenkla våra kunders vardag. Det gör att du bidrar till något större, oavsett roll. Här finns det många roliga, utvecklande jobb och du har goda chanser till en spännande karriär.
 



  





 Vi tror på ett hållbart arbetsliv och jobbar aktivt med inkludering och mångfald. Våra moderna kontor bjuder in till samarbete och lärande, här får vi saker att hända! Du har flexibiliteten att kunna varva arbete på kontoret med att jobba hemifrån, utifrån verksamhetens behov.
 



 Läs mer och se filmer om livet hos oss på
 
 folksam.se/jobb-och-karriar.
 




  





**Så söker du jobbet** 




 Välkommen att skicka in din ansökan senast 27 maj 2026. Vi intervjuar löpande så skicka in din ansökan redan nu.
 



  





 Vill du veta mer om jobbet är du välkommen att kontakta gruppchef Karin Tegerhult Nordström, 070-836 76 87.
 



  





 Fackliga representanter: Akademikerföreningen Per Hansson 070-831 60 67, Forena Mari Leppioja 070-831 54 29 och Handels Mikael Carlsson 070-831 51 32.

title: Cloud Infrastructure Architect AWS
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Vill du vara med och forma framtidens molnlösningar?
   

  

 Du blir en del av Capgeminis Cloud & Infrastructure Services (CIS)-enhet med fokus på projekt- och konsulttjänster i Norden. Vårt mål är att erbjuda kunder helhetslösningar inom Cloud och vi erbjuder en mängd olika tjänster till våra kunder, från strategisk rådgivning till projektgenomförande.
   

  

*I denna roll kommer du ha en nyckelroll i att:*
* Designa och implementera komplexa, skalbara och säkra AWS-lösningar anpassade efter kundens behov
* Ge teknisk vägledning och support vid felsökning under en hel projektleverans
* Samarbeta med intressenter för att samla in krav och föreslå effektiva migrationsstrategier
* Agera som en betrodd rådgivare till kunder gällande branschtrender och ny teknik
* Dela kunskap inom organisationen genom mentorskap, utbildning och skapande av återanvändbara artefakter


**Din Profil**
* Minst 7 års erfarenhet av praktisk design av molnbaserad företagsarkitektur, lagrings- och nätverkslösningar
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av att bygga, migrera och modernisera företagsapplikationer på enterprisenivå
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av molntransformation
* AWS-certifieringar på professionell nivå (t.ex. Solutions Architect Professional, DevOps Engineer Professional) samt erfarenhet av automatisering och skriptning (t.ex. Terraform, Python, CDK, shell, Ruby, Powershell)
* Kunskap om säkerhets- och efterlevnadsstandarder (t.ex. HIPAA, GDPR)
* Flytande i Svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift


 Önskvärda kvalifikationer:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av AWS-tjänster (t.ex. AWS Application Migration Service (MGN), Cloud Migration Factory, Portfolio analysis tooling) samt hantering av storskaliga migreringar från datacenter till datacenter och/eller från datacenter till molnet; drift av datacenter (t.ex. datasäkring, övervakning, larm och notifieringar)
* Erfarenhet av att integrera AWS AI/ML-tjänster (SageMaker, Bedrock, Amazon Q); förståelse för styrning inom AI/ML och ansvarsfulla AI-praktiker


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas:**
* Konkurrenskraftig lön, förmånliga tjänstepensioner och kollektivavtal som ger trygghet
* Fokus på din hälsa och ditt välmående, med initiativ för att skapa balans mellan jobb och fritid
* En arbetsmiljö med kollegor som stöttar och inspirerar varandra, och chefer som har ditt bästa i fokus
* Brett utbud av karriärmöjligheter och tillgång till Capgeminis stora utbildningskatalog, särskilt inom den senaste teknologin för t.ex. cloud och generativ AI
* En företagskultur där mångfald och inkludering värdesätts högt


**Ansökan**
*I denna rekrytering hanterar vi ansökningar löpande. Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov. Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryterare Jessica Fogelsjöö, Jessica.fogelsjoo@capgemini.com.*
 Till denna roll söker vi medarbetare för säkerhetsklassat uppdrag placerad hos kund.
   

  

 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Software Engineer - Internal Tooling
description:
**Build something monumental for Healthcare!**
 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You care about making systems work where it really matters, behind the scenes, where complexity tends to hide. At your previous role, you were likely drawn to problems that others avoided: messy logic, unclear ownership, and workflows that didn’t quite hold together. You enjoy bringing structure to that - building systems that are not just functional, but reliable and easy to reason about.
   

  

 At Tandem, you’ll work at the intersection of product, operations, and business logic, owning and building the internal systems that power how we operate at scale. A key focus for this role is
 **billing and invoicing** 
 , where product usage, access, and real-world workflows need to translate into correct, auditable invoices.
   

  

 This is not just about payments, it’s about deeply understanding how our product is used in practice, how that maps to our business model, and building the systems that make it all work seamlessly. You’ll work closely with engineering, operations, and commercial teams to ensure that what we build internally is robust, scalable, and aligned with how Tandem grows.
   

  

 If you enjoy working close to the business, taking ownership of complex logic, and building systems that directly impact how a company runs - this is your kind of role.
   

  

 What You Will Do
   

  

* Own and build Tandem’s internal tooling and operational systems, with a primary focus on billing and invoicing.
* Design and implement systems that connect product usage and access control to invoicing logic (e.g. integrations with Stripe).
* Build workflows that ensure invoices are generated correctly based on real-world product behavior and customer setups.
* Develop and maintain integrations between internal systems, databases, and external platforms (e.g. billing, CRM, analytics).
* Work closely with operations and commercial teams to understand business needs and translate them into robust technical solutions.
* Improve and automate internal processes to reduce manual work and increase reliability.
* Build internal APIs and services that support operational workflows and scale with the company.
* Take end-to-end ownership, from problem definition and system design to implementation, monitoring, and iteration.


 What You Bring
   

  

* Experience as a software engineer working on backend systems or internal tooling.
* Strong ability to model and implement business logic in code, especially in complex or evolving domains.
* Experience working with APIs, integrations, and data flows between systems.
* Familiarity with cloud environments (e.g. AWS, Azure, or similar).
* A pragmatic mindset - you focus on building systems that actually work in practice.
* Interest in working close to the business and understanding how technical systems map to real-world operations.
* Strong ownership and the ability to drive work independently in a fast-moving environment.


 Bonus Points
   

  

* Experience working with billing, invoicing, or financial systems (e.g. Stripe or similar platforms).
* Experience building internal tools or backoffice systems.
* Familiarity with data modeling for usage-based systems.
* Experience applying automation or AI to operational workflows
* Experience in regulated environments (healthcare, fintech, etc.).


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

 Our interview process consists of 4 stages:
   

  

* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interview with some of our Engineers
* Interview with our CTO & Co-Founder
* Home case and presentation at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch, and a presentation to experience our our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 25 days/year of paid vacation
* Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag)
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


**Culture at Tandem**
 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Software Engineer
description:
*Do you have strong coding skills and a passion for building reliable software? Do you want to contribute to building the future for a seamless and connected society? This might be the role for you!* 




  





**Giesecke+Devrient** 
 (GD) specializes in securing mobile connections, legal identities, and digital infrastructures. When it comes to digital security, we serve as the trusted partner for governments, public authorities, and enterprises globally. We safeguard and manage confidential systems, networks, data, and identities in physical, digital and mobile environments.
 



  





 We are now looking for a talented
 **Software Engineer** 
 to help us design, build, and deliver high-quality software solutions for critical business applications in the SIM provisioning world. This is a permanent position where you'll have the opportunity to work with modern technologies in an agile environment and make a real impact.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 As a
 **Software Engineer** 
 , you will be part of a collaborative team, developing scalable and robust systems. You’ll work hands-on with the latest frameworks and tools, contributing to the full software development lifecycle—from design and implementation to testing and deployment.
 



*Your responsibilities include:* 



* Design, develop, test, and deploy high-quality software solutions for SIM management applications
* To understand and define requirements and deliver features in an agile environment
* Write clean, maintainable code following best practices and coding standards
* Optimize applications for performance and scalability
* Contribute to the automation of build, test, and deployment processes using Jenkins and CI/CD pipelines
* Continuously learn and apply new technologies to deliver value and improve software quality



  





**Qualifications** 




 We are looking for a hands-on engineer with a collaborative and problem-solving mindset and a strong technical foundation. You have a degree or Master´s in Computer Science, Engineering or a related field as well as:
 


* Experience in backend or full-stack software development with focus on Java
* Familiarity with modern frameworks such as Spring, Angular
* Experience in database technologies, especially Oracle and SQL
* Experience using code quality and security analysis tools such as SonarQube and Black Duck
* Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
* Fluent in English



  





 It will be a big plus if you also have:
 


* Cloud experience (especially AWS)
* Familiarity with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Experience in telecom or mobile network environments.
* Familiarity with GSMA security and compliance standards.
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum teams; SAFe



  





**What’s next?** 




 If this sounds like the place and role for you – apply today!
 



  





 We look forward to getting to know you better! Welcome with your application no later than
 **May** 
**29th, 2026.** 




  





**Why G+D?** 




 At G+D, you’re not just joining a company, you’re joining a diverse, supportive, and purpose‑driven community. In this role you will have the opportunity to work with talented people in an international and innovative environment. G+D is a well-established family-owned company at the forefront of the market. Besides a dynamic and evolving industry, we offer you:
 


* A culture that values trust, innovation, and continuous learning
* Personal and professional development with a wide range of training and learning opportunities
* Competitive compensation and benefits
* Work-life balance with a hybrid work model
* The chance to make a real impact on secure digital ecosystems



  





**Get to know us and our team at G+D Sweden better by listening to our Job cast below:** 




*Shaping the next chapter of the digital age* 




*Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/episode/71GyhbDv090LgVyukyLf7v?si=f399b1f0d93e47e3*

*Our DNA is in our people* 




*Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/episode/6BpWiUCMXr3q68dSGEr2w7?si=e4328a3c8db34b8d* 




*Acast: https://shows.acast.com/5cdc00c69e126b7939fb506b/646e070580b8d100110f0e95*

title: Software Engineer
description:
*Vill du vara med och bygga den tekniska grunden för några av världens mest avancerade marina system?*
 Som DevOps Engineer hos oss får du kombinera teknik, struktur och förbättringsarbete i en roll där automatisering, kvalitet och innovation står i fokus. Här blir du en nyckelperson i ett team som utvecklar och förvaltar den infrastruktur som gör våra produkter möjliga – från kod till färdig produkt.
   

  

**Din roll**
 I rollen som DevOps Engineer säkerställer du att mjukvaran kan byggas, testas och levereras snabbt, säkert och tillförlitligt. Du får stort inflytande över hur vi utformar våra utvecklingsplattformar, verktyg och metoder – och blir en viktig del i att driva vår tekniska resa framåt.
   

  

 Hos oss arbetar du i en modern och samarbetsinriktad miljö, präglad av teknikintresse, engagemang och ständig utveckling. Vi värdesätter kunskapsdelning, ansvarstagande och en kultur där alla hjälps åt att hitta de bästa lösningarna.
   

  

**Hos oss får du:**
* Arbeta med moderna tekniker och komplexa system i en högteknologisk miljö
* Påverka arkitektur, verktygsval och arbetssätt
* Utrymme att växa i rollen och utveckla din kompetens inom moderna DevOps-lösningar
* Kollegor som gärna delar erfarenheter och stöttar varandra


**Dina arbetsuppgifter**
* Designa, konfigurera och optimera CI/CD-pipelines i Jenkins och relaterade verktyg
* Utveckla skript och automatiserade flöden i Bash, Python eller Go för att effektivisera bygg- och deployprocesser
* Implementera och förvalta infrastruktur som kod med Ansible och Docker
* Delta i utveckling av interna verktyg, integrationslösningar och webbaserade stödsystem
* Utföra avancerad felsökning och kontinuerligt förbättra byggsystem och processer
* Samarbeta med andra team för att tillämpa DevOps-principer och skapa effektiva, automatiserade flöden


**Din profil**
 Du har en civilingenjörs- eller högskoleingenjörsutbildning inom data, IT, elektronik eller motsvarande, samt god förståelse för DevOps, automation och CI/CD-flöden.
   

  

 Du har erfarenhet av att arbeta i Linux-miljöer och trivs i miljöer där tillförlitlighet, säkerhet och kvalitet är avgörande.
   

  

 Som person är du analytisk, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad. Du gillar att se resultatet av välfungerande automatiserade flöden och motiveras av att bidra till förbättringar som gör skillnad. Samarbete faller dig naturligt, och du delar gärna kunskap med andra.
   

  

 Flytande svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift, samt svenskt medborgarskap är ett krav.
   

  

**Vad blir du en del av**
 Här har du chansen att påverka och bidra på ditt unika sätt och varje bidrag räknas. Vi ger dig möjlighet att anta utmaningar och skapa smarta innovationer. I vår vänliga och tekniksmarta värld finns plats för dig att växa. Vi finns här för att tillsammans skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 23 000 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description:
**Craft:**
 Technology & Development
   

  

**Job Description:**
 Full-stack Software Engineer
   

  

 Want to work with the world’s best mobile games? Have you got the skills to make the next big thing? We’re looking for a Full-stack Software Engineer to join our Kingdom. Our games are adored by hundreds of millions of people, and you’ll be helping to make them even better, as well as contribute to the engines, systems and platforms that make them play brilliantly on any platform.
   

  

**Your role within the Kingdom**
 If you want to create amazing user experiences and entertainment for millions of players to enjoy on the go then this is the right job for you. As part of the Central Web Tech team in Candy Crush Saga, together with your colleagues you will have a role in creating and maintaining brilliant gaming experiences for our players. You will design and implement existing and new game features.
   

  

**Your responsibilities will include:**
* Implementing and testing new or optimizing existing game features
* Taking an active part in feature creation
* Accountability for the technical metrics of the work items you deliver
* Contributing high-quality and well-structured code to our global code base


****Skills To Create Thrills****
 Programming experience and dedication for gaming as well as the willingness to share great ideas are equally valued.
   

  

* Full-stack development: Architecting scalable frontend and backend solutions using Typescript, React, Node.js, and Java
* Database management: Proficient in both SQL and NoSQL database design and optimisation
* API design: Expertise in building and optimising RESTful APIs, RCP and real-time communication via WebSockets
* Cloud infrastructure: Hands-on experience deploying and scaling applications on GCP
* Security & identity: Deep understanding of user authentication protocols, including JWT and OAuth
* Version Control: Expert use of GitHub for collaborative development and workflow management
* Responsive design: Optimising web applications for cross-platform performance, including WebViews and mobile-responsive layouts


**Additional bonus qualifications:**
* DevOps: Experience implementing CI/CD pipelines, specifically utilising GCP Cloud Build
* Mobile Development: Basic proficiency in native mobile development for Android (Java) and iOS (Swift)
* Experience in working with complex systems that interact with other features or parts of a project


**We also value**
* That you are passionate about games and would love to create the next big thing


***About King***
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.
